title: Funnel Systems Architect
description:
We are a fast-paced CRM technology firm (Prosper Flow & CNVX AI) looking for a Funnel Systems Architect. We aren’t looking for someone to build one-off, artisanal web pages. We need a systems-thinker who understands how to build, clone, and govern high-converting funnel infrastructure at scale.

If you understand that a funnel is a fully integrated conversion engine—and you know how to build repeatable templates without quality collapsing—we want, you on the team.



THE SCOPE OF THIS ROLE



YOU WILL OWN: Funnels, landing pages, forms, calendars, template/cloner deployment, lead routing rules, and conversion tracking.



YOU WILL NOT OWN: Outbound SMS/email strategy, proposal tools, sales enablement assets, mobile apps, or client closing.



What You’ll Own:



• Funnel Deployment & Template Scaling: Build and deploy high-converting funnels using our Website Cloner approach. You will establish the global style guardrails and brand compliance checks to ensure 20 client builds don't become 20 different "snowflakes."

• Multi-Location "Near Me" Rollouts: Spin up localized, multi-city landing pages at scale, reusing proven sections and conversion elements to drive local calls and bookings efficiently.

• Conversion Flow Design: Architect multi-step funnels with seamless web form and calendar handoffs that reliably turn traffic into booked appointments.

• Lead Routing & Qualification: Configure the underlying conversion plumbing. You will set up routing and assignment logic (based on geo, rules, or capacity) to ensure leads hit the right location, while using basic scoring to keep junk leads out of our "booked" metrics.

• Performance Tracking & QA: Own the funnel analytics. You will rigorously track form completion rates, multi-step drop-offs, and calendar booking conversions, while triaging page speed or load issues that kill conversions.





What We’re Looking For:

• Platform Mastery: Deep, functional expertise in XOLBY is highly preferred. You must know how to manipulate funnel builders, form integrations, and routing rules inside complex CRM environments.

• Systems Over One-Offs: You manage a library, not just a canvas. You know how to use templates to ship fast without sacrificing design or conversion standards.

• Data-Driven Triage: When a funnel breaks or traffic isn't converting, you know exactly which metrics to check and how to fix the leak.



If this is you send us a message or book appointment here

title: Xero Bookkeeper for UK Businesses (4–6 hours per week)
description:
We are looking for a reliable Xero bookkeeper to maintain accounting records across several UK businesses.



This is a long-term part-time role for approximately 4–6 hours per week.



The role includes maintaining accurate bookkeeping in Xero and producing a simple monthly management accounts report to help the business owner understand performance.



The businesses include:



• UK tutoring business (sole trader)

• Two small limited companies

• One holding company with very low transaction volume



Total transaction volume is relatively low, but accuracy and organisation are very important.



Responsibilities



Weekly / Ongoing



• Bank reconciliation in Xero

• Categorising transactions correctly

• Maintaining accurate records across multiple Xero organisations

• Checking accounts are clean and up to date



Monthly



• Close books for the month

• Prepare a simple management accounts report



Monthly Report Pack Should Include



A simple management accounts report similar to those used by business coaching organisations.



Example sections:



• Profit & Loss summary

• Expense breakdown

• Cash position

• Revenue trends / monthly comparison

• Key metrics



The goal is to provide a clear overview of the financial health of each business.



Requirements



• Experience using Xero accounting software

• Strong bookkeeping knowledge

• High attention to detail

• Good written English communication



Preferred but not essential:



• Experience working with UK businesses

• Xero certification

• Experience producing management reports

title: SEO Link Building Specialist – Freelance/Contract (Remote)
description:
About the Project

I'm a self-employed online marketing expert running multiple websites with a strong focus on organic traffic through SEO. My main strategies include high-quality backlink building via guest posts and carefully selected PBN domains.

To scale faster, I'm looking to bring on a reliable freelance contractor to handle the most time-intensive parts of link acquisition. This is a pure contract/freelance position — no employment contract, no benefits, no fixed schedule. You work as an independent contractor and get paid based on hours worked.



Job Description

As an SEO Link Building Specialist, you'll play a crucial role in enhancing my websites' search engine rankings by focusing on high-quality backlink acquisition. Your primary responsibilities will include:



Competitor Link Profile Analysis: 

Research and analyze competitors' backlink profiles using tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Moz. Identify high-value, relevant, and attainable backlink opportunities.



Guest Post Outreach: 

Conduct outreach to website owners for guest posting opportunities. This includes identifying suitable sites, crafting personalized pitches, negotiating terms, and tracking outreach progress to secure placements.



Aged Domain Sourcing for PBNs: 

Scout and evaluate expired or aged domains with strong metrics (e.g., natural backlink profile, clean history, niche relevance). You do not build, host, or manage the PBNs — only research, analyze, and recommend/acquire domains.





Requirements

Proven experience in link building (at least 1 year, ideally with guest posting and/or domain sourcing).

Proficiency with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Majestic, or similar for backlink analysis.

Strong research skills for identifying competitors, outreach targets, and aged domains.

Excellent written communication skills for outreach
s and pitches.





What I Offer

Contract type: Independent contractor / freelance.

Rate: 300 PHP per hour.

Hours & Commitment: Work your own hours, from anywhere. No strict minimum or maximum hours per week — we will negotiate a flexible target (e.g., 10–30 hours/week or specific deliverables) during our discussion to align with project needs and your availability. Scale up/down as suits both of us.

Tools & access: I provide access to Ahrefs and specialized domain tools such as GoDaddy Auctions and Spamzilla. If other tools become necessary, we'll discuss and arrange access as needed.

title: Financial Markets Analyst (Economics / Financial Economics Graduate)
description:
We are currently looking to connect with recent graduates in economics or financial economics who are interested in financial markets, research, and data-driven storytelling.



We are building a small, collaborative team focused on researching UK and international financial markets and turning complex market dynamics into clear, compelling data visualisations.



The goal is simple: take interesting market questions, explore them using credible data, and communicate the insights through thoughtful visual outputs that can be shared publicly.



What the role involves

This role is focused on ideas, research, and market interpretation. You would work closely with a data analyst/visualisation specialist to translate market insights into clear visual formats.



Responsibilities may include:

Identifying interesting themes in global financial markets

Formulating research questions around macroeconomic or market developments

Finding relevant datasets and credible sources

Interpreting economic and market data

Collaborating with a data specialist to develop visual outputs



This opportunity may suit someone who:

Has recently graduated in Economics, Financial Economics, Finance, or a related field

Has a strong interest in financial markets, macroeconomics, and policy

Enjoys research, critical thinking, and idea generation

Is curious about how data can be used to tell clearer market stories

Is comfortable working in a collaborative, startup-style environment



Important note

This is not a permanent or full-time role.



In the first instance, we are exploring informal, ad-hoc collaboration, which could work well alongside further study or an existing role. The focus is on building a strong working partnership and developing high-quality research outputs together.



If this sounds interesting, feel free to reach out or send a short message. We would be happy to have an informal conversation.

title: Applicant Experience Director
description:
About Tadhana

Tadhana is the Philippines’ first exclusive matchmaking platform for extraordinary singles. We combine human insight, curated video profiles, and real connection to create meaningful introductions, not just swipes. We’re an early-stage startup building something that doesn’t exist yet in the Philippine market.



The Role

You’ll be the face of Tadhana for every applicant. Your job is to personally interview each person who applies to join the platform, both in-person in the Manila/Makati area and via video call for applicants outside Metro Manila. You’ll assess whether they’re a genuine fit for our community, guide them through the process, and help accepted members build polished, professional profiles, including photos, video introductions, and written bios. Every interaction should reflect the premium, personal brand we’re building.



What You’ll Do

• Conduct in-person interviews with applicants in the Manila/Makati area

• Conduct video call interviews with applicants who can’t meet in person

• Evaluate each applicant’s sincerity, personality, and fit for the Tadhana community

• Score and document each interview using our internal review system

• Communicate decisions to applicants: acceptance, waitlist, or decline, with warmth and professionalism

• Coordinate interview scheduling and follow-ups

• Provide feedback to leadership on applicant trends and common questions

• Help shape the interview process as we grow and refine our standards

• Direct and coordinate professional photo sessions for accepted female members

• Guide members through filming their 60-second video introductions

• Help craft each member’s written profile and bio so it’s polished and on-brand



Who You Are

• Warm, professional, and an excellent judge of character

• Comfortable conducting interviews both in person and on camera

• Strong communicator in English and Filipino

• Discreet and trustworthy, you’ll be handling personal and sensitive information

• Organized and reliable with scheduling and follow-through

• Passionate about relationships, people, and building something meaningful

• Based in or near Manila/Makati with flexibility to meet applicants at designated locations

• Eye for aesthetics, comfortable directing photos, video, and profile presentation



Why This Role Matters

Tadhana isn’t a dating app, it’s a curated community. Every member is hand-selected, and you’re the person making that call. The quality of our platform depends directly on the quality of your judgment and the experience you create for applicants. This is a foundational role with real impact.

title: Executive Recruitment Assistant
description:
Cain & Mann is a boutique executive search firm specialising in placing senior M&A professionals — from Senior to Managing Director level — at investment banks and advisory boutiques across the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). We operate at the top end of the market: our clients are elite firms, our candidates are high-calibre dealmakers, and our process is tight, systematic, and relationship-driven. 



We are hiring an Executive Recruitment Assistant to support our lead consultant in running a high-volume, multi-channel outreach operation. Your job is to help us identify, reach, and qualify senior M&A candidates so that consultant can spend his time on partner-level calls — not on list-building and first-touch messages.

This is not a passive admin role. You will be doing real recruitment work: sourcing candidates from LinkedIn and our internal database, crafting personalised outreach across multiple channels, logging every touchpoint in our CRM, and driving candidates toward a qualification call with consultant.



Weekly Work Rhythm

We run a structured weekly cycle that you will own and repeat every week:



Monday – Tuesday (Sourcing): Find fresh leads. Build targeted candidate lists. Cross-reference against our CRM to avoid duplicates. Verify profiles are current and relevant. Follow Up. 

Wednesday – Friday (Outreach): Execute systematic outreach using provided scripts across LinkedIn,
, WhatsApp for Business, and SMS. Log all activity. Follow up. Push candidates toward a call with Consultant.

title: TikTok Budget Content Creator - Screen Recording + Video Editing
description:
I run a budgeting content brand on TikTok. I create short-form videos where I break down someone’s monthly budget (income, bills, expenses, debt, savings) while showing the numbers being entered into a budgeting app on screen.



I need someone to handle two things for each video:



1. Screen recording: Open the budgeting app on your computer (web version), follow the budget table I provide, and record yourself entering the numbers into the app. Slowly, cleanly, no mistakes. Use OBS or any screen recorder. You can select dark mode, change the color, etc.



2. Video editing: Take the screen recording, the voiceover audio I provide, and the hook videos I provide. Cut and arrange the hook, speed it up, make edits, (~7 seconds), then the budget screen recording synced to the voiceover. Put it all together into a final TikTok-ready video using CapCut (or similar).



Everything you need for each video will be organized in a shared Google Drive folder. You pick up the materials, do the work, and upload the finished video back to the Drive. Simple and repeatable.



What You Need

• A computer that can screen record clearly (OBS or similar — smooth, no lag, good resolution)

• Experience with CapCut or similar short-form video editing tools

• Attention to detail — numbers must be entered exactly as provided

• Reliable internet and access to Google Drive

• Available to complete 3–5 videos per day on a consistent basis



What I Provide For Each Video

• The full budget story (written text)

• A budget table with exact numbers to enter into the app

• Voiceover audio (pre-recorded)

• Hook videos for the opening of the video (~7 seconds of character footage)

• Access to the budgeting app (test account provided)

• Reference videos so you know exactly how the final product should look



Pay

Starting pay is $0.60 per finished video. This is ongoing, part-time work. The more consistent and reliable you are, the more videos you get. Payment via PayPal, once per month.



Bonus

If videos do well there is a bonus structure and also possibility of raising your pay. Show me that you wanna work and improve, and I can raise your pay!



How to Apply



Please do this task:





Do NOT apply if you are going to copy-paste a generic cover letter. I will ignore it.

title: Billing & Financial Operations Assistant (Part-Time Virtual Assistant)
description:
About Our Organization

Daily Grace Adult Day Health Services is a healthcare program based in Georgia, USA that supports seniors and adults with disabilities through therapeutic day services, community activities, and health support programs.

We are looking for a detail-oriented and organized Virtual Assistant to support our billing and financial operations. This role focuses on maintaining accurate financial records, preparing invoices, and supporting internal accounting processes.

This position works closely with the business owner and bookkeeper.

________________________________________

This role involves financial data accuracy and billing support. We value long-term team members and reliable performance.



Key Responsibilities

Billing & Accounts Receivable Support

• Prepare invoices in QuickBooks Online based on weekly attendance reports

• Record and apply client payments to the correct invoices

• Maintain accurate accounts receivable records

• Identify and flag unpaid or incorrect invoices for review

Financial Data Entry & Organization

• Categorize routine expenses in QuickBooks Online using provided rules

• Upload and organize receipts and financial documentation

• Match transactions to bank and credit card records when appropriate

Reporting Support

• Update weekly Accounts Receivable tracking spreadsheet

• Prepare simple financial summaries for internal review

• Maintain organized digital files for billing and financial records

Program Documentation Support

• Assist with preparing documentation related to the CACFP food reimbursement program

• Organize attendance and meal records for review before submission

Payroll Preparation Support

• Compile employee timesheets for payroll review

• Identify missing or incomplete time records

• Prepare payroll summary reports for processing

Support transportation billing records by tracking invoices and payments related to non-emergency medical transportation services.

________________________________________

Important Boundaries of the Role

This position does not:

• Process payroll

• Submit payroll taxes

• Transfer money or access bank accounts

• Make financial decisions

• Change accounting structures

All financial approvals remain with the business owner and bookkeeper.

________________________________________

Skills & Experience Required

• Experience with QuickBooks Online

• Strong attention to detail

• Experience with data entry or billing processes

• Ability to follow structured procedures

• Strong written English communication

• Organized and comfortable working with spreadsheets

• Reliable internet connection

Preferred but not required:

• Experience with bookkeeping support

• Experience with healthcare or service-based businesses

________________________________________

Personal Qualities We Are Looking For

• Careful and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with repetitive tasks

• Organized and dependable

• Able to follow clear instructions and processes

• Willing to ask questions if something is unclear

This role is best suited for someone who enjoys structured work and accuracy.

________________________________________

Training & Support

You will receive clear training on:

• Our billing process

• Invoice preparation procedures

• Financial documentation organization

• Internal workflows

We value long-term team members and provide clear instructions and support.

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about your experience with billing or financial data entry

2. Your experience using QuickBooks Online

3. Your availability each week

4. The phrase “Accuracy Matters” in the first line of your application (this helps us confirm attention to detail)

________________________________________

Opportunity for Growth

This position may expand in hours and responsibility as the organization continues to grow.

title: Real Estate Data & Lead Generation (Public Records Research VA)
description:
About Us



Polus Acquisitions Group is a U.S.-based real estate investment company that specializes in acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. Our business is built on identifying motivated sellers through public records research, data analysis, and targeted outreach.



We operate remotely and collaborate as a team across several departments including data research, lead generation, marketing, and acquisitions. Our system is designed to consistently generate new opportunities by pulling property data from government sources and turning that data into conversations with homeowners.



We are currently looking for a Real Estate Data & Lead Generation Manager who can take ownership of our lead generation pipeline and help ensure our data systems run smoothly and consistently.



Compensation



Base Salary: $400 per month



Paid bi-weekly (every two weeks).



In addition to base salary, bonuses are paid when contracts close from leads that you generated and managed.



This means the quality and consistency of your work directly impacts your ability to earn additional income.



Schedule



Full-time position



Monday – Friday

40 hours per week



Some overlap with U.S. business hours may be required for communication with the team.



How Our System Works



Our company uses a data-driven system to identify homeowners who may be interested in selling their property.



The process begins with public records research, where we locate property owners through county government databases, court records, and property tax systems.



After the data is collected, it is cleaned, verified, and organized before being uploaded into our CRM. From there, our marketing systems contact property owners through SMS outreach and other marketing channels.



If a homeowner expresses interest in selling, the lead is documented and passed to our acquisitions team who negotiates and closes the deal.



Your role is to ensure that new leads are consistently entering the system and that the data is clean, accurate, and organized.



Your Responsibilities

Public Records Research



You will regularly research and navigate U.S. county public records websites to locate property ownership data.



Examples include:



• Probate filings

• Tax delinquent properties

• Pre-foreclosure filings

• Code violations

• Property transfers

• Eviction filings



You must be comfortable navigating:



• County clerk websites

• District clerk court records

• Property appraisal district websites

• Tax assessor databases

• Recorder / deed records



Data Collection & Verification



You will gather important information including:



• Property address

• Owner name

• Mailing address

• Parcel / APN number

• Filing details when applicable



You will also verify ownership data by cross-checking multiple sources.



Data Cleaning & List Preparation



You will organize and prepare data by:



• Removing duplicate records

• Standardizing address formatting

• Cleaning and organizing spreadsheets

• Preparing CSV files for CRM import



Accuracy and organization are extremely important.



Skip Tracing



Once property data is collected, you will assist with skip tracing to locate contact information for property owners.



This may include finding:



• Phone numbers

•
 addresses

• Additional ownership records



SMS Lead Generation



Once leads are prepared, they will be uploaded into our system for SMS marketing campaigns.



You may assist with:



• Preparing lead lists

• Managing responses from property owners

• Updating CRM records

• Identifying interested sellers



Independence & Problem Solving



This role requires someone who can think independently and figure things out without constant supervision.



We will provide training materials and SOPs that explain our systems and processes, but we expect team members to take initiative and learn how to navigate tools, websites, and workflows on their own.



You should be comfortable:



• Researching solutions when systems are unfamiliar

• Navigating new county websites independently

• Solving problems without needing step-by-step guidance for every task



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of their responsibilities and help keep the system running smoothly.



Team Collaboration



Although independence is important, communication with the team is equally important.



You will work alongside:



• Data researchers

• Lead managers

• Acquisitions specialists



You must be able to:



• Provide updates on your work

• Communicate issues clearly

• Coordinate with team members when leads move through the pipeline



Strong teamwork and communication are essential to keeping the operation running effectively.



Requirements



• Strong research and problem-solving skills

• Experience working with spreadsheets and datasets

• Ability to navigate websites and collect information

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment

• Strong English communication skills



Experience with real estate, property data, or lead generation is highly preferred.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is proactive and self-motivated

• Can figure things out without constant supervision

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Works well in a team environment

• Takes pride in producing accurate and reliable data



Why Join Our Team



This is an opportunity to work directly with a growing U.S. real estate investment company and gain valuable experience in real estate lead generation, property research, and data systems.



Team members who perform well will have opportunities for long-term growth and increased responsibility within the company.



How to Apply



To apply, please follow these instructions carefully.



Send your application to [Insert
 Address]



Subject Line: Data & Lead Generation Manager – OJPH



Attach your resume



Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction



At the top of your application include the phrase:



“PUBLIC RECORDS VA”



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer
description:
Explomo is looking for a talented YouTube thumbnail designer who understands cinematic storytelling and can translate a video’s atmosphere into a powerful visual that attracts viewers without compromising authenticity.



Explomo is a documentary-style YouTube channel focused on exploring abandoned places across Europe — from forgotten castles and noble mansions to untouched time-capsule homes and historic estates. Each episode uncovers the story of the people who once lived there and preserves these places before they disappear.



The channel currently has hundreds of videos and a large international audience, built around a consistent visual identity and a strong focus on atmosphere, history, and mystery.



Because of this, thumbnails need to do more than just look good — they must capture the story, tension, and curiosity of the exploration itself.



What we’re looking for



We are searching for someone who:

- Understands YouTube psychology and CTR-driven thumbnail design

- Can create thumbnails similar in style and impact to creators like this:



- Is able to watch a video and identify the key visual story or 
nt

- Can translate that 
nt into a thumbnail that sparks curiosity instantly

- Knows how to balance strong visual hooks with authenticity

- Understands that Explomo thumbnails should feel cinematic, mysterious, and real — not overly clickbait



Important qualities

The ideal candidate:

- Has experience designing YouTube thumbnails that perform well

- Has a strong eye for composition, lighting, and storytelling

- Can work with dramatic interiors, abandoned locations, and atmospheric scenes

- Is comfortable experimenting with ideas while keeping the Explomo brand identity consistent

- Understands that sometimes less is more — a single powerful image can outperform a cluttered design



Workflow

Typical workflow may look like this:

- Watch the video or selected 
nts.

- Identify the core story or discovery in the episode.

- Design a thumbnail that visually communicates that 
nt.

- Deliver multiple variations if needed for A/B/C testing.



Rate

???? Rate per thumbnail is negotiable, depending on experience and quality.

This is potentially long-term work, as Explomo regularly publishes new episodes and series.



To apply

Please include:

- Examples of YouTube thumbnails you designed. Only include examples that you genuinely believe would be a great fit for the style and atmosphere of the Explomo channel, or designs that demonstrate you could create thumbnails in a similar cinematic and storytelling-driven style.

- Links to channels/videos where your thumbnails were used

- A short explanation of how you approach CTR-driven thumbnail design

- (Optional) A sample thumbnail idea for an Explomo-style video



If you understand storytelling through images — and know how to turn a quiet abandoned place into a thumbnail that makes people click — we’d love to hear from you.



Maureno

Explomo

title: Android Developer (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose) - EdTech Startup
description:
About Us:

We're building Chameleon, a digital wellness app for K-12 schools in the United States. The app helps students develop self-regulation skills by gamifying focus time during class. Think of it as "Screen Time meets classroom gamification" - students earn points for staying focused, compete with classmates, and level up their trust privileges.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to help build something that will impact thousands of students. We have complete UI designs ready - we need a skilled developer to bring them to life.



What You'll Build:

Student App Features:



Home screen with points, streaks, and class rankings

Join classroom via 6-digit code (number pad input)

Active session screen with shield animation and timer

Leaderboard showing class competitions

Profile with achievements and trust level progress



Teacher App Features:



Dashboard showing class stats

Session setup (class name, app selection)

Real-time student monitoring grid

Session management (start/end)



Technical Work:



Build UI screens in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose (or XML if preferred)

Integrate with Firebase Firestore for real-time data sync

Implement Firebase Authentication

Handle offline mode with local Room database

Work with our Lead Developer on architecture decisions

Required Skills:

? 2+ years Android development experience

? Strong Kotlin skills

? Experience with Jetpack Compose OR Android XML layouts

? Firebase Firestore and Firebase Auth integration

? RESTful API integration

? Git version control

? Good English communication (written and verbal)

? Published at least 1 app to Google Play Store

Bonus Skills (Not Required):

? Experience with Room database

? Background services / WorkManager

? Push notifications (Firebase Cloud Messaging)

? UI/UX design sense

? Experience with EdTech or school apps

title: Executive Assistant
description:
The Mission

Your job is to buy back leadership time.



This role exists to protect the CEO and Operations Manager from low-leverage tasks so they can focus on:

Revenue

Growth

Strategic execution

Scaling HashStash into a household name in Cannabis Culture



If something creates friction in the business, you remove it.

You are not here to “assist.”

You are here to create leverage.



Scope of Role

This is a dynamic, fast-moving role.

Responsibilities include, but are not limited to, the following:

This position requires flexibility, ownership, and a proactive mindset. As the business evolves, so will the scope of this role.



Core Responsibilities



1. Executive & Calendar Management

Manage complex calendars (deep work blocks, meetings, project time)

Schedule meetings intentionally and efficiently

Protect creative and revenue-generating time

Prepare meeting agendas

Take meeting notes and distribute action items

Provide a daily progress update to leadership

Ensure leadership reports are submitted before executive meetings



2. Buy Back CEO Time

Continuously audit leadership tasks

Identify what can be:

Delegated

Deleted

Automated

Systemized

Filter communication so only high-value items reach leadership

Ensure nothing falls through the cracks



3. Communication & Inbox Management

Manage
 inboxes

Filter Slack and internal communications

Draft responses on behalf of leadership

Track follow-ups and action items

Maintain organized inbox systems

Ensure timely communication resolution



4. Project & Team Accountability

Manage projects inside Notion

Track deadlines and deliverables

Check in with tea
mbers to ensure progress

Provide clear updates to CEO & Operations Manager

Ensure projects move forward without bottlenecks



5. Travel & Logistics

Book flights, accommodations, and itineraries

Handle schedule adjustments and changes

Create detailed travel plans

Ensure leadership is fully prepared for trips

Manage transportation coordination



6. Financial & Administrative Oversight

Track receipts and expenses

Submit reimbursements

Coordinate with finance team when needed

Ensure documentation is properly organized

Maintain structured Google Drive systems



7. eCommerce & Operations Support

Experience with or exposure to:

Shopify

Amazon Seller Central

Triple Whale

Inventory tracking

Vendor communication



Support may include:

Product uploads and listing edits

KPI reporting

Data organization

Issue escalation coordination



Who You Must Be

You embody HashStash values:

Speed – You execute quickly and with urgency.

Growth – You seek feedback and improve systems.

Leadership – You take ownership and operate independently.

Moving the Needle – You prioritize high-impact tasks.

Innovation – You suggest better processes without being asked.

title: Looking for VSL Video Editor for Fast Growing eCommerce Brand
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor specialized in VSLs and Mini-VSLs to join our fast-growing eCommerce company.



We are building a creative team focused on high-converting video sales letters (VSLs) and performance marketing creatives.



This is not just a typical editing role.



This is a creative performance role where your work directly impacts the growth of the company.



We primarily advertise to older audiences (50–70 years old) in Western markets.



Because of this, our style is story-driven, structured, and persuasive — not fast TikTok-style editing.



We are looking for someone who understands direct response marketing and can turn scripts and angles into compelling VSL-style video ads.



You will work closely with the CEO and the creative team to build powerful ads that convert.



---



ROLE



Your main responsibility will be editing VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing.



These videos will be used for:

-
 & Instagram ads

- Advertorial funnels

- Direct response campaigns



You will take scripts, angles, and concepts and turn them into high-converting video ads using strong storytelling and pacing.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing

- Turn scripts into engaging video stories

- Source and structure B-roll to support the narrative

- Use AI tools to generate visuals and clips when needed

- Improve pacing, emotion, and clarity in videos

- Create multiple variations of ads for testing

- Collaborate with the creative team to improve concepts



---



REQUIREMENTS



You MUST:

- Have experience editing direct response VSLs or video ads

- Understand basic direct response principles (hooks, storytelling, problem ? solution, testimonials, authority angles)

- Be comfortable working with AI creative tools



Experience with tools like:

- Higgsfield, NanoBanana Pro or similar image generation tools

- Video generation models such as Veo3, Kling, or Sora



You should also:

- Be able to work independently

- Have a reliable laptop or computer setup

- Have fast and stable internet

- Be fluent in English



---



BIG PLUS



- Experience creating VSLs for ads or funnels

- Understanding of performance marketing creatives

- Ability to suggest new creative angles

- Strong storytelling intuition



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



- 4–6 high quality VSL / Mini-VSL ads per week

- Strong hooks and storytelling structure

- Continuous improvement in editing quality

- Your own ideas for improvements

- Clear communication with the creative team



---



COMPENSATION



- Starting rate: $6/hour

- 2-week paid trial period

- Performance bonuses for winning ads/edits (up to $250 for editing winning ad)

- Pay increases over time based on performance

- Opportunity to grow into a long-term part-time or full-time position



We are building a long-term creative team, not just hiring freelancers.



---



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY



When applying, please include:

1. Examples of your best VSLs or video ads

2. Tell us if you have experience with Higgsfield or image generation models

3. Tell us if you have used video generation models like Veo3, Kling, or Sora

4. Explain shortly what makes a VSL convert

5. If you read the whole job post, include the word “VSL” at THE END of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



---



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us and contribute creatively, not just edit clips.



If you are disciplined, creative, and passionate about performance marketing, this could become a strong long-term opportunity.



Looking forward to your application.



—



Kacper Jegier

CEO, KJ ECOMMERCE LIMITED

title: Experienced Cold Caller – Real Estate (Script + Training)
description:
About the Job

We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns. 



We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on https://vocaroo.com or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi. We are interested in purchasing the property at 1389 Thomas Ave. in Montgomery. Would you be interested in selling the property now or at a later point in time?



Just to verify are you the property owner?



I want to ask you a few questions. It will only take a minute.

Overall, would you say the property is in good shape, fair condition, or needs some work?” 



Is the property occupied or vacant?



What’s prompting you to consider selling?



I'm going to have the buyer Lee directly give you a call. When is a good time to reach you?



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: Operations Lead — Elite Career Advisory (UK-Based)
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory helping students and professionals secure positions at the world’s elite corporate careers. 



We have:

 ? 153+ documented client outcomes

 ? Founder who has taught at Harvard Business School, Yale, and MIT

 ? 2,800+ member community

 ? Six trademarked career frameworks

 ? Growing social media presence (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn)



We are looking for an Operations Lead to run the day-to-day operations so our founder can focus on content creation and premium client delivery.

This is not a task-following VA role. You will be the operational backbone of the business — managing content shipping, lead response, client onboarding, and team coordination.



THE ROLE

You will be the founder’s right hand. Everything operational flows through you.

Content Shipping (Priority #1)

 ? Receive edited videos from our video editor

 ? Quality check all content before posting

 ? Schedule and post content via GoHighLevel to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn

 ? Ensure weekly targets are hit: 1 YouTube + 5 TikToks + 5 Reels + 3 LinkedIn posts

 ? Chase the video editor if deliverables are late

Lead Response

 ? Respond to all inbound leads within 2 hours (DMs,
s, enquiries)

 ? Qualify leads and schedule calls with founder

 ? Follow up with non-responders

 ? Update CRM pipeline in GoHighLevel

Client Onboarding

 ? Send contracts and process payments via Pensight

 ? Set up client folders and welcome materials

 ? Schedule first sessions

 ? Collect testimonials after client wins

Calendar & Inbox Management

 ? Manage founder’s calendar

 ? Protect deep work and filming blocks

 ? Triage
 and draft responses

 ? Flag urgent items

Community Management

 ? Moderate Skool community (2,800+ members)

 ? Welcome new members

 ? Answer basic questions

 ? Flag complex questions for founder

Team Coordination

 ? Coordinate with video editor and 2 interns

 ? Assign tasks, set deadlines, review work

 ? You are the hub — everyone reports through you operationally



DAILY RHYTHM

 ? First thing: Check all inboxes. Respond to urgent items. Flag for founder.

 ? Morning: Respond to leads. Schedule calls. Update CRM.

 ? Midday: Content shipping. Coordinate with editor. Post via GHL.

 ? Afternoon: Community management. Client admin. Team coordination.

 ? End of day: Send daily update to founder.



WEEKLY TARGETS

 ? Lead response time: Under 2 hours

 ? YouTube posted: 1 per week

 ? TikToks posted: 5 per week

 ? Instagram Reels posted: 5 per week

 ? LinkedIn posts: 3 per week

 ? Daily updates sent: 5 per week

 ? Zero inbox: Daily



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have:

 ? 3+ years experience as VA, EA, Operations Manager, or Project Manager

 ? Experience with GoHighLevel OR similar CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

 ? Experience scheduling/posting content to social media

 ? Excellent written English (you will communicate with UK clients)

 ? Proactive communicator — flags problems before they escalate

 ? Detail-oriented — nothing falls through the cracks

 ? Comfortable managing a small team (editor + interns)

 ? Available for at least 4 hours overlap with UK timezone (GMT/BST)

Nice to Have:

 ? Experience in coaching, education, or professional services business

 ? Experience with Skool community platform

 ? Experience with Pensight or similar booking/payment tools

 ? Basic video editing skills (backup for editor)

 ? Experience working with founder-led businesses

Tech Stack:

 ? GoHighLevel (CRM + content scheduling)

 ? Pensight (payments/booking)

 ? Skool (community)

 ? Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar,
)

 ? TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn (posting)



WHO YOU ARE

 ? You take ownership. You don’t wait to be told what to do.

 ? You communicate proactively. If something is stuck, you say so immediately.

 ? You are reliable. When you say something will be done, it gets done.

 ? You are detail-oriented. You catch mistakes before they go out.

 ? You can manage others. You’re comfortable assigning tasks and holding people accountable.

 ? You want to grow. This role can become COO as the business scales.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

In 30 Days:

 ? Content shipping at full rhythm

 ? All leads responded within 2 hours

 ? Daily updates flowing

 ? Founder has zero admin tasks

In 90 Days:

 ? Business running smoothly without founder in operations

 ? 10+ new testimonials captured

 ? First £100K quarter achieved

In 12 Months:

 ? £500K+ revenue

 ? Team grown to 6-8 people reporting to you

 ? You promoted to COO



HOW TO APPLY

Please include in your application:

 1. A brief introduction (2-3 sentences about you)

 2. Your experience with CRM tools (specifically which ones)

 3. Your experience with social media scheduling/posting

 4. Your experience managing a team (even if small)

 5. Your available hours and timezone

 6. Your expected salary in USD/month

Bonus: Record a 60-second video introducing yourself. This is not required but will put you at the top of the list.



We will respond to qualified candidates within 48 hours.

We are a US-based business consulting firm helping organizations reduce operational expenses.  

We are looking for a driven, articulate, and organized part-time VA to support our business development through prospect research and outbound appointment setting. You will work directly with the business owner in a focused, low-volume, high-quality outreach environment. This is not a high-volume call center role - quality and professionalism matter more than quantity here.



What You'll Do

Use CRM identify qualified prospects across our target industries

Find and verify decision-maker names, titles, phone numbers, and
s

Log all prospects with full details



On outreach days (2-3x per week):



Make outbound calls to US-based decision-makers 

Leave professional voi
s and follow up 

Set qualified appointments on behalf of the business owner

Document all activity, outcomes, and next steps in the daily activity log





Requirements (Must-Have)



Clear, neutral, or American-sounding English accent – this is essential for this role

US BPO or US-account call center experience strongly preferred

Proven experience cold calling US businesses

Demonstrated B2B appointment setting experience

Highly organized with strong attention to detail in documentation





Performance Goal

To Apply

Your resume

Are you familiar with TikTok Shop?



Do you have reliable internet?

title: Creative Specialist (Video Editing & Graphic Design)
description:
Savant Marketing is the #1 marketing agency for landscapers. We’re looking for a highly creative and detail-oriented Creative Specialist who can help bring our marketing campaigns to life through high-quality video ads, graphic designs, and YouTube thumbnails.



This is an excellent role for someone who loves visual storytelling, short-form video editing, and graphic design, and wants to work with a fast-growing digital marketing agency.



Role Overview



We’re searching for a Creative Specialist who thrives in a fast-paced marketing environment and can consistently produce engaging creative assets that drive results.



This role is perfect for someone who loves:



? Editing short-form video content

? Designing high-converting ad creatives

? Creating attention-grabbing YouTube thumbnails

? Working with talking-head style videos

? Turning ideas into visually compelling marketing content



You will work closely with our marketing and media buying team to produce creative assets used in
 ads, social media content, and YouTube videos.



Key Responsibilities:



- Edit short-form video ads for
, Instagram, and other platforms.

- Create high-converting image creatives for advertising campaigns.

- Design YouTube thumbnails that attract clicks and drive engagement.

- Edit talking-head style videos by adding captions, graphics, transitions, and visual enhancements.

- Work closely with the marketing team to turn ideas into finished creatives quickly.

- Ensure all creative assets are high-quality, engaging, and optimized for performance without grammatical errors

- Organize project files and maintain efficient workflows for editing and revisions.

- Continuously improve creative output by studying top-performing ads and marketing content.



Requirements



- 1+ years experience working in an agency environment

- Strong graphic design skills for ad creatives and thumbnails.

- Experience using Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar video editing tools.

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to high-quality work.

- Reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate with a remote team.





Work Schedule



Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (EST Time Zone)



How to Apply

• A brief note explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Email Designer — E-Commerce Email Marketing Agency
description:
Job Title:

*
 Designer (Part-Time / Per Project) — E-Commerce
 Marketing Agency**



---



## Job Description:



We are a growing
 marketing agency based in Europe that works with e-commerce brands. We are looking for a **talented and reliable
 designer** to join our team on a **part-time / per-project basis**.



You will be designing
 campaigns and
 flows (welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, etc.) for our clients using **Figma** and/or **Canva**. Our clients are mostly Shopify-based e-commerce brands, so experience with product-focused
 design is a must.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants **consistent, ongoing work** with a growing agency. We start per-project, and as we grow, this can become a full-time position with a fixed monthly salary.



---



## What You'll Be Doing:



- Designing professional
 campaigns (promotional, seasonal, product launches)

- Designing
 flows (welcome series, abandoned cart, win-back, post-purchase)

- Following brand guidelines for each client (colors, fonts, style)

- Designing mobile-first, responsive
 layouts

- Delivering clean, organized Figma files with properly named layers

- Implementing feedback and revisions quickly (usually 1-2 rounds)



---



## Requirements:



**Must-Have:**

- 2+ years of experience in *
 design** (not just graphic design — we need someone who understands
 layout and structure)

- Strong portfolio with *
 design examples** (please include at least 5
 designs in your application)

- Proficient in **Figma** (primary tool) and **Canva**

- Understanding of *
 design best practices** (600px width, mobile responsiveness, CTA placement, web-safe fonts, image optimization)

- Experience designing for **e-commerce brands** (product
s, sale campaigns, etc.)

- Strong attention to detail — pixel-perfect designs

- Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate clearly in English

- Available to work during **European business hours** (at least 4-5 hours overlap)



**Nice-to-Have (not required, but a plus):**

- Experience with Klaviyo or Mailchimp
 builders

- Basic HTML/CSS
 knowledge

- Experience with landing page design

- Adobe Photoshop / Illustrator skills



---



## How We Work:



- All communication happens on **Slack** — fast, organized, and professional

- You will receive a **design brief** for each project with clear instructions, copy, brand assets, and references

- You deliver your design in **Figma** — we review, give feedback, and you revise

- Typical turnaround: **8 hours for a first draft**, 4 hours for revisions

- We provide **SOPs, brand guidelines, and templates** so you always know exactly what to do



---



## Compensation:



We pay **per
 design**, not hourly or monthly (to start).



| Design Type | Rate |

|------------|------|

| Standard
 campaign | $7 - $10 per design |

|
 flow (per
) | $7 - $10 per design |

| Simple banner / graphic | $3 - $5 |



**Current volume:** 15-30
s per month (growing)

**Estimated monthly earnings:** $100 - $300+ depending on volume



As our client base grows, we plan to move to a **fixed monthly salary** for the right person. We value loyalty and long-term partnerships — if you deliver great work consistently, there is room to grow with us.



---



## What We Offer:



- **Consistent, ongoing work** — not a one-time project

- **Clear briefs and SOPs** — you'll never have to guess what we need

- **Room to grow** — from per-project to part-time to full-time

- **Professional team** — organized, respectful, and easy to work with

- **Creative freedom** — we trust your design skills and welcome your input

- **On-time payments** — always paid on time via Wise (TransferWise), every 2 weeks



---



## How to Apply:



**Please include the following in your application:**



1. **Your portfolio** — must include at least 5
 designs (Behance, Dribbble, PDF, or Figma link). If you don't include
 design samples, your application will not be considered.



2. **A short introduction** — tell us about yourself, your experience with
 design, and why you'd be a great fit.



3. **Your availability** — how many hours per day/week are you available? What are your working hours?



4. **Answer this question** (to confirm you read the full job post): *"What is the standard
 width for desktop
 design?"*



**Applications without a portfolio or without answering the question above will be ignored.**



---



## About Us:



We are a small but ambitious
 marketing agency that helps e-commerce brands grow through high-converting
 campaigns and automated flows. We care about quality, reliability, and building long-term relationships — both with our clients and our tea
mbers.



If you're a skilled designer who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with a team that values your talent, we'd love to hear from you.



---



*We look forward to your application!*

title: Virtual Wholesale Sales Representative
description:
Job description:



We are urgently looking for a Wholesale Sales Representative focused on increasing sales through lead generation and cold calling in Australia typically plays a vital role in growing the business by acquiring new customers and nurturing relationships with potential clients. Their tasks can include:



Lead Generation:



Identifying and researching potential clients across industries that would benefit from the products or services.

Using tools such as LinkedIn, business directories, industry associations, and trade shows to create a list of prospective customers.



Cold Calling:



Reaching out to potential leads to introduce the company and its offerings, aiming to set up meetings or sales discussions.

Developing effective cold-calling scripts and strategies to overcome objections and engage prospects in meaningful conversations.



Sales Pitch:



Presenting products or services to potential clients, emphasizing their benefits and competitive advantages.

Tailoring sales pitches to the needs of the customers, with a deep understanding of market trends and customer pain points.



Relationship Building:



Establishing and maintaining strong relationships with key decision-makers within targeted businesses or organizations.

Following up with prospects to ensure they remain engaged and move through the sales funnel.



Tracking and Reporting:



Monitoring sales activities, maintaining a database of leads, and reporting on the progress of outreach efforts.

Providing feedback to the sales team on customer needs, market trends, and competitor strategies.



Achieving Sales Targets:



Meeting or exceeding set sales targets through continuous lead generation, cold calling, and closing deals.

Identifying cross-selling and upselling opportunities to maximize revenue.



Customer Service:



Ensuring client satisfaction through excellent customer service and support after the sale.

Addressing customer inquiries, managing issues, and coordinating with internal teams for product delivery or support.



Key Skills for this Role:



Strong communication and negotiation skills

Ability to work autonomously and meet targets

Understanding of the Australian market and its specific needs

Proficiency with CRM software and sales tools

Resilience and persistence, especially when handling cold calls or rejections



Skills & Qualifications:



- Holder of a Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or any related field

- At least 1 year of proven work experience in the Sales Support function/Marketing, specifically developing marketing campaigns in a BPO Company or International Company

- At least 1 year of cold calling, lead generation and marketing
s

- Intermediate to Advance knowledge in Graphic design through canva

- People person: excellent verbal and written communication skills and making sales

- Analytical, detailed and multitasking

- Results-oriented, organized team player

- Can work individually and in minimal supervision

- with own device (Laptop or Desktop) to use for the job

- Willing to install Hubstaff app to monitor time and productivity

- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Rockstar Lead Generator/New Business Prospector
description:

Daily Responsibilities include

1. Finding prospective customers through multiple social media channels - youtube,
, linkedin, instagram, tiktok and contacting them to solicit interest and new business. 

2. Researching local businesses and professionals through google and other channels to find potential clients in niche markets and reaching out by
, social media, phone call or text. 

3. Use spreadsheet or CRM to track all contacts made and provide daily report.

5. Schedule appointments for prospects to meet with an advisor or customer service rep.

6. Follow strict rules on information able to provide - financial services are regulated and only certain details/information can be shared or gathered by unlicensed personnel.

2.  Experienced with multiple social media platforms and using to search for contacts - linkedin, 
, youtube

, WhatsApp, Slack, Teams

description:
If you are interested in this role, please contact us on 
 to apply for the vacancy.

When messaging, please include:



Your resume

Examples of Shopify stores you have created

Any digital products you have worked on

We are looking for applicants who are ready to start immediately, can work weekends when needed, and are able to get straight to work helping us build and grow the store.



Job Description

We are looking for an experienced and reliable tea
mber to help build and grow a professional Shopify store selling digital products for tradesmen and DIY workers.

Our brand focuses on tools that help tradespeople save time, stay organised, and run their work more efficiently using digital resources such as templates, guides, planners, and business tools.

We currently have products listed on our **Etsy store called The Trade Guide Co., but we are now planning to transition to a Shopify store so we have more control over branding, design, and customer experience.

The Shopify store must be created to a very high standard. It needs to look clean, modern, professional, and built to convert visitors into buyers.

Applicants should check our Etsy store “The Trade Guide Co.” before applying to understand the type of digital products we currently sell and how the listings are structured.

Responsibilities

Your responsibilities will include:

• Creating a professional Shopify store from start to finish

• Designing a clean and modern store layout

• Setting up digital product delivery systems

• Creating high-converting product pages

• Transferring and improving products from our Etsy store

• Creating new digital product listings regularly

• Designing digital products such as:

Invoice templates

Quote templates

Job sheets

Work planners

Client tracking sheets

Trade business tools

• Creating product visuals and mockups

• Writing clear and persuasive product descriptions

• Posting short-form content on:

TikTok

Instagram Reels

Pinterest

X 
)

• Researching new digital product ideas

• Helping grow the store to 100+ digital products

Requirements

Applicants must have experience creating professional Shopify stores.

You should:

• Have proven experience building Shopify stores

• Be able to create clean, modern, high-converting store designs

• Understand Shopify product setup and digital product delivery

• Have experience creating digital products using Canva, Google Docs, or Excel

• Be organised and able to work independently

• Have good English communication skills

Bonus skills:

• Experience with Etsy digital product stores

• Short-form video editing

• SEO or product research

Payment

• Monthly salary: $650 USD

• Paid via Wise

• First month includes a 2-week probation period

Payment structure:

$325 paid after the first 2 weeks

Remaining $325 paid at the end of the month if performance and progress are good

This position can become long-term with higher pay as the store grows.

If you are motivated, organised, and ready to help build a professional digital product store, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: English Virtual Assistant (Repost Messages)
description:
Your job is to send other people links on items that can be bought low, and resold for higher, so they can make a profit from reselling them.



Repost messages from one 
 server to another. Around 10-60 messages per day that is around 1-6 sentences.

You need to be able to understand English well, you can not sound like a robot.

Ex) Don't say "Ako ay 25 taong gulang."

Say "Ako ay dalawampu't limang taong gulang."



You need to be on time and repost within 0-2 mins. 

Last person got fired because of unpunctuality. 

If you are late consistently you will be fired, because your job is to help other people buy items from your links, if you are late, the product will sell out, and they won't be able to buy it and resell it for a profit.



We have more opportunities in the field available which can earn you up to 35k peso, with basically no additional work. 

You will need to be native speaker English level, in writing. 



If you are mass applying without even looking, do not apply for this job, because we will send follow up messages asking you to read and perform tasks, and if you don't do the example, you will not get a text back. Save us both time.



More detail

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.
