title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Salesforce Developer (Remote, Philippines)
description:
Now Hiring: Salesforce Administrator / Developer (Remote, Philippines)

We are a fast-growing education and training provider seeking a Salesforce Administrator/Developer to join our dynamic team. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about optimizing Salesforce, enjoys problem-solving, and thrives in a collaborative, remote environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Configure, customize, and maintain Salesforce to support business operations.

• Develop and deploy custom objects, workflows, process builders, flows, and validation rules.

• Create and maintain reports, dashboards, and analytics for management and teams.

• Integrate Salesforce with third-party applications and tools.

• Support users with troubleshooting, training, and best practices.

• Work with leadership to streamline processes and improve CRM efficiency.

Qualifications

• Minimum 2 years of experience as a Salesforce Administrator or Developer.

• Salesforce Administrator certification required; Developer certification preferred.

• Strong knowledge of Salesforce Lightning, automation tools, and data management.

• Experience with Apex, Visualforce, and API integrations a plus.

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

Salary Range:

• Mid-Level:Php 55,000 – Php 85,000/month ( $950 USD – $1,465 USD)

• Senior-Level: Php 105,000 – Php 116,000+/month ( $1,800 USD – $2,000+ USD)



Remote work 

Must be available to work Monday–Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST (U.S. Eastern Time).



Opportunity to work with an international team on impactful education projects.



Professional development and growth within the organization.

title: VA– Admin, Marketing & Business Support
description:
IMPORTANT – READ FIRST 



To be considered for this position, you MUST do the following:

 1. Start your application with the number “12”

 2. Submit a short virtual video (1–3 minutes) explaining:

 • Why you believe you’re a good fit for this role

 • Your experience (or willingness to learn) in marketing, admin work, and software tools

 • Why you are looking for a long-term working relationship



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.







About Us



4PRO Restoration Solutions is a professional water, fire, and mold remediation company serving Denver and surrounding areas. We focus on high-quality work, strong communication, and long-term relationships with both customers and partners.



You can learn more about what we do here:

 



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who wants to grow with the company and become a trusted right-hand person in both administrative and online marketing tasks.



About the Role



This role is a mix of administrative support, creative marketing, and tech/software learning. You don’t need to know everything on Day 1 — what’s most important is that you are organized, proactive, eager to learn, and communicative.



You will work closely with the owner and help manage day-to-day tasks that keep the business moving forward.







Key Responsibilities



Administrative & Operations

 •
 management and follow-ups

 • File organization and data entry

 • Research tasks (vendors, tools, competitors, marketing ideas)

 • CRM support (learning and building workflows)

 • Transferring and organizing files, documents, and customer data

 • Handling miscellaneous tasks as needed



CRM & Software (Training Provided)

 • Learn and help build Zoho CRM

 • Organize leads, contacts, and pipelines

 • Assist with automation, notes, and task tracking

 • Learn new software/tools that improve business efficiency



Marketing & Creative Tasks

 • Create weekly marketing flyers and simple graphics

 • Assist with
 marketing campaigns

 • Help manage and organize online content

 • Research marketing trends and ideas for restoration services

 • Assist with Google Business Profile updates (photos, posts, etc.)



SEO & Analytics (Preferred but Not Required)

 • Basic understanding of SEO concepts

 • Experience or interest in Google Analytics / Google Search Console

 • Keyword research and content ideas

 • Tracking simple performance metrics







Ideal Candidate



We’re looking for someone who is:

 • Extremely detail-oriented

 • Reliable and consistent with deadlines

 • Strong in written English communication

 • Comfortable taking initiative and asking questions

 • Willing to learn new tools and systems

 • Interested in a long-term working relationship

 • Organized and able to manage multiple tasks







Preferred Experience (Not Required)

 • Virtual assistant or admin experience

 • Zoho CRM (or similar CRM platforms)

 • Canva or basic graphic design tools

 • SEO, Google Analytics, or digital marketing

 • Working with U.S.-based businesses







Why Work With Us?

 • Long-term opportunity with growth into full-time

 • Training provided for tools and systems

 • Respectful, relationship-focused work environment

 • Opportunity to become a key part of a growing U.S. business

 • Stable and clear communication expectations







How to Apply



Please submit:

 1. Your resume

 2. A short video (1–3 minutes) explaining why you’re a great fit

 3. Start your application with the number 12



We are excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and become an essential part of 4PRO Restoration Solutions.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
Title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time | 40 hours/week | 1pm–9pm PH Time (aligned with Dubai working hours)

Salary: Based on experience and skillset + performance bonus + paid UK bank holidays + paid day off on your birthday.



The Role:



This is a creative-led design and video editing role for someone who wants to own the visual identity of a fast-growing wellness brand. You'll be our lead creative resource—ideating and executing concepts across
, social media (organic and paid), YouTube, campaigns, and digital channels. You'll bring briefs to life from concept to execution, edit compelling videos, design assets, and help shape our overall content strategy. If you live and breathe design and video, understand what makes content scroll-stopping, and want to build something that matters — this is it.



What You'll Do:



> Design assets and create content across all digital channels

> Edit video content for social media (short-form) and YouTube (long-form)

> Cut, splice, and assemble footage into engaging narratives

> Add music, sound effects, subtitles, text overlays, and motion graphics

> Source and integrate stock footage where needed

> Bring creative briefs to life—from ideation to concept development and final execution

> Develop and evolve the brand identity while acting as a brand guardian

> Deliver best-in-class visual assets that perform

> Ensure visual consistency and alignment with brand guidelines across all touch-points



Non-Negotiables:



> Excellent working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (especially Premiere Pro, After Effects) and Figma

> Strong video editing skills with a portfolio demonstrating your work

> Ability to edit both short-form social content and long-form YouTube videos

> Experience adding subtitles, text overlays, music, and sound design

> Strong portfolio demonstrating design, typography, layout, and video editing

> An eye for good design, branding, social media trends, and marketing

> Meticulous attention to detail and strong project management skills

> Team player who thrives in a collaborative environment



Strong Preference If You…



> Have a degree in Graphic Design, Video Editing, or similar

> Have experience with AI tools like Midjourney, Nano Banana, or similar for content creation

> Understand social media platforms deeply and what makes content perform

> Can demonstrate video content that's driven engagement or growth

> Have experience with motion graphics and animation



What Success Looks Like:



> Our visual identity feels distinctive, consistent, and evolving

> Video content performs—high watch time, engagement, shares, and saves

> Social videos and YouTube content come to life beautifully

> You're generating ideas the team gets excited about

> The brand feels cohesive and premium across every touchpoint



About Innermost:



We believe the path to better health lies in a balance of nature and science. Inspired by ancient wisdom and powered by modern evidence-based research, we've crafted a new approach to wellness — natural ingredients that have stood the test of time combined with cutting-edge science to create products that are as effective as they are authentic. We've experienced significant growth and have ambitious plans for the future. If you want to be part of a team that's changing an entire industry, we'd love to hear from you. Learn more at 



Application Process: 



Please send the following via the OnlineJobs portal:



> Your CV

> Your creative portfolio including video editing examples (essential — we need to see your work)

> A 60-second Loom video explaining why you'd be a great fit



And then please answer these questions in your application:



> Do you have excellent working knowledge across Adobe Creative Suite and Figma?

> Where do you live; city or village?

> How fast is your internet and do you have reliable electricity?



We get many applications from people who don't fulfil these requests or answer those questions, and who are not considered as a result. Don't let that be you. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. Thank you.

title: Experienced Virtual Assistants Needed (E-commerce Brand)
description:
Experienced Virtual Assistants Needed (E-commerce Brand)

Customer support 
, chat, and order assistance)

title: Mobile App QA Tester (Long-term) — Background App Monitoring (No Experience Needed)
description:
Looking for 500+ Android users to help test and monitor a background Android app across different phone and tablet brands/models.



Already applied to this mobile app tester role before? Please don’t re-apply — we’ll contact you if you’re a fit.



This is very simple: install the app from the Google Play Store, keep it running, and follow short testing/verification steps when requested.



What you do (simple):

- Install the app (Google Play Store)

- Keep it running in the background

- Phone stays connected to the internet (20-24h/day)

- Occasionally complete short check-in/testing steps (to confirm stability + uptime)



Why it’s a good fit:

- No calls, no meetings

- Works alongside any VA/freelance job

- Setup once ? keep running long-term

- Great for anyone who wants a low-effort side gig



Requirements:

- Android device (phone or tablet)

- Stable internet

- Phone online most of the day (target: 20–24h/day uptime)

- Reliable/consistent (uptime matters)



? Please do NOT apply if:

- Your phone is only online a few hours/day

- You use airplane mode at night / regularly disconnect

- You only use iPhone/iPad



? If you can keep your phone online 20–24h/day consistently, you’ll do well here.



How to apply:

One application per person. If you’ve applied before, no need to submit again.



Fill out this short form (takes 2 minutes): https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeEZwrQ5fN6QeelzTM5OGsiJ26ALtXwZZKX1HFPc0HtQwkxvw/viewform?usp=publish-editor



If you qualify, I’ll send setup instructions and your access code.

title: Talent Scout/Brand Ambassador
description:
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys community building, networking, fashion, photography, social events, and meeting interesting people.



What the Role Involves



Your responsibilities may include:



Community Outreach



Inviting women from your social circle or network to participate in photography shoots or events



Introducing new people to our creative community



Sharing upcoming opportunities with people who may be interested



Talent Scouting



Identifying potential models or creators who may enjoy participating in shoots



Helping discover new faces for photography projects



Connecting us with people who are confident on camera or interested in modeling



Event Participation



Attending shoots or gatherings occasionally



Helping new participants feel comfortable when they arrive



Acting as a friendly point of contact during events



Social Media Promotion



Sharing occasional updates about shoots or events on social media (optional)



Tagging and engaging with community members online



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Social and friendly



Comfortable meeting new people



Connected with other women who enjoy creative environments



Reliable and respectful



Interested in photography, fashion, modeling, or lifestyle content



Positive and professional when representing the brand



You do not need to be a professional model — many ambassadors are simply well-connected, confident women who enjoy creative experiences.



Ideal Background (Not Required)



This role may suit someone who is:



A model or aspiring model



A content creator or influencer



A university student with a strong social circle



Someone active in nightlife, events, or creative communities



Someone who naturally connects people together



Benefits



Brand Ambassadors may receive:



Professional photography from shoots



Priority invitations to creative events



Networking opportunities with photographers and creatives



Referral bonuses for successful introductions



Exposure through collaborative content



This role can be flexible and part-time, depending on your availability.

title: CRM Management/Data Entry/Real Estate Virtual Assistant - Flexible Schedule
description:
Virtual Assistant for Real Estate Investor



I'm a U.S. based real estate investor looking for a reliable and detail-oriented virtual assistant to support my outreach efforts. This role focuses on communication and involves reaching out to realtors and homeowners via
 and text message.

What you'll be doing

You'll manage
 and SMS outreach campaigns to realtors and property owners. I will provide templates for all message content. You'll maintain and update contact lists and CRM records. You'll draft and send professional messages using the templates I provide. You'll track responses and flag leads that need my attention. You'll handle general administrative tasks as needed.



What I'm looking for



Strong written English skills with a professional and friendly tone. Experience with
 platforms and Google Workspace or Microsoft Office and basic data entry. Familiarity with Dialpad IVR or Resimpli is a plus. Ability to multitask and stay organized across multiple conversations. Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace. Previous experience in real estate or sales support or lead generation is helpful but not required.



Schedule and compensation

Part time to start with potential to grow into a full time role. Schedule is flexible. Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



******To apply****



1. Visit our website (
) and determine where our company is located.

2. In your
 use the subject line "Virtual Real Estate Application - (city where we are located)"

3. In 2-3 sentences tell me why you're interested in this role and why you'd be a good fit

4. Answer this question: What two types of people will you be reaching out to in this role?

4. Include your experience level with
 outreach or CRM tools

5. Tell me your favorite song



Make sure to follow all the steps above. If you are selected to move forward there will be a short video conferencing call. Please do not write more than what has been requested or your application may be disregarded.

title: AI Marketing & Social Media Manager
description:
AI Marketing & Social Media Manager (Remote – Full Time)



Company: Lightning Bult Electrical, Plumbing & Air Conditioning

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full Time – Australian business hours preferred



Lightning Bult is a fast-growing home services company based in Sydney, Australia. We provide electrical, plumbing, air conditioning and pool heating services.



We are looking for a highly organised AI-savvy Marketing & Social Media Manager to manage our digital presence across multiple platforms and help grow our brand online.



This role is ideal for someone who understands modern AI marketing tools, video content, social media automation and analytics.



Your job is to turn our photos, videos and ideas into consistent, high-quality marketing content that reaches thousands of homeowners every week.



Your Mission



Your mission is to take Lightning Bult’s real photos, videos and ideas and turn them into:



• Social media posts

• Short form videos

• Blog articles

•
 newsletters

• YouTube content



You will organise, create, schedule and publish content so our marketing runs consistently with minimal input from the business owner.



Responsibilities

Content Creation & AI Marketing



Use modern AI tools to produce marketing content including:



• Social media posts

• Short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Blog articles

•
 newsletters

• Caption writing and hashtag optimisation



Tools you may work with include:



• Blaze AI

• ChatGPT

• Canva

• CapCut / video editing tools

• Mailchimp

• Scheduling platforms



Social Media Management



Manage posting across all platforms including:



•

• Instagram

• TikTok

• YouTube

• LinkedIn

• Nextdoor

• Google Business Profile



Responsibilities include:



• Scheduling posts

• Writing captions

• Uploading videos

• Monitoring engagement

• Responding to comments and messages professionally



Video Editing & Short Form Content



Turn job site videos into engaging content such as:



• Before / after videos

• Educational tips

• Service explanations

• Customer success stories

• Short YouTube content



Media Library Management



Organise and maintain our Lightning Bult media library so that:



• Only original photos and videos from our work are used

• Files are organised by service type (electrical, plumbing, air conditioning etc.)

• Content is easy to access for future campaigns



Marketing Calendar



Create and maintain a seasonal marketing calendar that includes content for:



• Summer / winter services

• Storm season

• Air conditioning demand

• Hot water issues

• Preventative maintenance



Your goal is to ensure consistent weekly posting across all platforms.



Performance Tracking



Track marketing performance and provide reports including:



• Reach and engagement

• Video performance

• Website traffic

• Leads generated from marketing

• Campaign effectiveness



You will provide a simple monthly report showing what is working and what can be improved.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Has strong experience with social media management

• Understands AI marketing tools

• Has video editing skills

• Is organised and detail-oriented

• Has excellent written English

• Can work independently and follow systems

• Understands analytics and performance tracking



Experience with home services, trades or local service businesses is a plus.



Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)



Experience with:



• Blaze AI

• Mailchimp

• Canva

• CapCut

• ChatGPT workflows

• YouTube optimisation

• SEO blogging



What Success Looks Like in This Role



Within the first 90 days you will have:



• Created a structured media library

• Built a 90-day marketing calendar

• Established consistent posting across all platforms

• Produced regular videos and content from our real job sites

• Increased reach, engagement and inbound enquiries



Salary



Competitive salary based on experience.



Please include:



• Links to social media accounts you manage

• Examples of videos you have edited

• Tools you are experienced with

• The word “Lightning” at the top of your application so we know you read this job description.



If you are passionate about AI marketing, video content and social media growth, we would love to hear from you



“Record a 60-second video explaining what AI tools you would use to grow Lightning Bult’s social media.”

title: Ecommerce Short-Form Ad Video Editor Facebook Ads
description:
We are building a premium ecommerce brand and are looking for a skilled video editor who understands short-form advertising for
, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.



Your job will be to take existing product videos and re-edit them into original high-performing ad creatives.



The product is in the posture / lifestyle niche and the videos must feel clean, modern, and premium.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Editing short-form vertical videos (9:16)

• Removing competitor branding from footage

• Creating new hooks for the first 3 seconds

• Adding bold caption text overlays

• Changing pacing and structure to improve retention

• Creating multiple variations from one video

• Formatting videos for
 / Instagram ads

• Adding voiceover or subtitles when needed



The videos should be optimized for advertising and designed to capture attention quickly.



We are NOT looking for cinematic editing.

We are looking for high-retention ad creatives.



Example tasks:



• Turn 1 competitor video into 3–5 new ad variations

• Add new hooks and captions

• Adjust pacing and zooms

• Make the video feel original and unique



Skills required:



• TikTok / Reels video editing

• Ecommerce ad creative editing

• Caption overlay design

• Fast-paced editing (cuts every 2-4 seconds)

• Basic motion graphics



Software that is acceptable:



• CapCut

• Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• Final Cut

• Other professional editing software



We will start with a few test videos.

If performance is good, this will become a long-term position.

title: Customer Service ++ Super admin
description:
This is a great opportunity to join a growing, passionate and dynamic team of health professionals providing skin cancer and cosmetic services to our clients.



You'll be working with our team to take inbound calls, answer client questions, book them in and support our team with a multitude of administrative tasks.





The ideal candidate will be highly organised and energetic, with a ‘can-do’ approach and keen to take on a broad range of tasks with the drive to constantly improve the patient experience.



• You must have a minimum of 5 years in customer support taking inbound calls.

• Previous experience in an administrative role in a medical or allied health service is ideal but not essential

• Patient-oriented, outgoing and friendly with a professional and approachable communication style.

• Strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication skills with a professional phone etiquette (proficiency in English is essential), with proven ability to put people at ease,answer their questions and get them on board

• Strong sense of personal integrity and confidentiality with the ability to work independently while being a part of a team.

• Possess strong computer skills (standard business, office, and medical applications including but not limited to Electronic Medical Records such as Halaxy, Google, Excel, Word, google Sheets/Drive)

• Naturally pay attention to detail

• Able to be on video during work hours



If this is you, you should apply.

If it's not, please don't apply.

You MUST have great spoken English





Responsibilities include:



• Managing bookings, payments, and correspondence, liaising with patients and doctors

• Responding to inbound communications on multiple platforms (phone and
) in a professional and friendly manner.

• Acting as a point of contact between patients and doctors, responding to enquiries and escalating where required.

• Maintaining accurate, timely and comprehensive medical records

• Providing quality customer service to patients.

• Other clerical and administration tasks such as creating patient files and data entry as required.





Applicants with a health background in medicine, pharmacy, nursing and others are encouraged to apply.

The working hours are Monday - Friday approx. 8.30am -5pm and Saturdays 8.30am - 12.30pm Perth time.

We may be able to swap some of your hours during the week for the hours on Saturday.

Salary up to 45,000 php depending upon your experience.



*****If you are interested, please submit a short video introduction describing yourself, what you are looking for in a position, your experience/qualifications, why you think you would be a good fit, what you are doing currently, and when you are available to start.***** Please
 to

title: Dispatch
description:
We are currently looking for a full-time dispatcher with experience using Limo Anywhere software to assist with managing bookings for our luxury chauffeur service.



We are a small business with a growing client base. While the number of rides is currently manageable, we are looking for a reliable dispatcher who can support our daily operations and help ensure that all bookings and client communications are handled professionally.



Responsibilities include monitoring incoming ride requests, managing reservations in Limo Anywhere, updating trip details, assisting with scheduling, and communicating with clients when necessary. The dispatcher must be able to respond to booking inquiries quickly and professionally.



The ideal candidate must have prior experience working with Limo Anywhere software and understand how limousine or chauffeur booking systems operate. Strong English communication skills are essential, along with professionalism, reliability, and the ability to communicate clearly with clients.



Applicants must have at least one year of experience working with limousine or chauffeur booking systems, preferably Limo Anywhere.



This is a full-time position with a monthly salary of $800.



Please include details about your experience with Limo Anywhere or other limousine dispatching systems when applying.

title: Project Manager for a Fast-Paced Agency
description:
We’re looking for a strong Project Manager to help lead operations inside a fast-paced agency environment.



This is for someone who can step into our existing systems, understand how we currently work, and make everything better. We want a problem-solver who can help improve workflows, keep projects moving, support the team, and communicate confidently with clients. You must be available from 9am-12pm EST. 



What we need help with:



- Managing day-to-day project flow across the agency



- Keeping tea
mbers accountable and making sure deadlines are moving forward



- Communicating with tea
mbers to remove bottlenecks and keep 
ntum strong



- Improving our existing systems and taking them to the next level



- Building and refining automations, preferably using Zapier



- Identifying problems early and bringing practical solutions



- Supporting client communication with professionalism and clarity



- Helping create smoother internal processes so the agency can scale



You’re likely a strong fit if you:



- Have experience as a project manager, operations manager, or similar role in an agency or service-based business



- Are highly organized and proactive



- Are comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with multiple projects at once



- Know how to follow up with people without needing to be told



- Are a strong communicator, both internally with tea
mbers and externally with clients



- Think in systems, processes, and solutions



- Have experience with automation tools, especially Zapier



- Can take ownership and improve what already exists, not just maintain it



This role is great for someone who:



- Likes bringing order to moving parts



- Can spot inefficiencies and fix them



- Enjoys solving problems instead of escalating everything



- Wants to play a key role in helping an agency run better and grow faster



To apply:



Please include the following in your application:



- A short intro about you and your background



- Your experience managing projects in an agency or fast-paced business



- Examples of systems or workflows you’ve improved



- Any automation experience you have, especially with Zapier



- How you handle team follow-up, deadlines, and project bottlenecks



- Your experience communicating with clients



- Why you think you’d be a strong fit for this role



- The word Project Manager at the top of your application so I know you read this post fully

title: Social Media & Graphic Design Manager (Supermarket Brand) – Full Marketing Ownership
description:
Social Media & Graphic Design Manager (Supermarket Brand) – Full Marketing Ownership



We are a growing family-owned supermarket company in Montreal, Canada, with multiple locations and a rapidly expanding online business.



We are looking for an experienced Social Media & Graphic Design Manager to take full ownership of our social media presence and marketing content. The candidate needs to speak French and English.



This is not a simple posting job.

We want someone who can plan, design, organize, and execute our social media strategy from A to Z.



You will work directly with the owner and be responsible for building and managing the brand’s online presence across multiple stores.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for everything related to social media and digital content, including:



Social Media Strategy



• Develop and execute a full social media strategy

• Plan weekly and monthly content calendars

• Identify opportunities for growth and engagement

• Analyze performance and improve results



Content Creation



• Create high-quality posts, stories, and reels

• Film and edit engaging short-form video content

• Design visually appealing content that reflects our brand

• Capture promotions, products, and in-store 
nts



Graphic Design



• Design professional marketing materials including:



Weekly supermarket flyers



Social media graphics



In-store promotional signage



Digital ads

• Redesign and modernize our supermarket flyer

• Ensure brand consistency across all materials



?? Important: We are looking for someone with advanced graphic design skills, not basic Canva work.



Preferred tools:

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Illustrator

• Adobe InDesign

• Advanced video editing tools



Social Media Management



• Manage Instagram,
, and other platforms

• Schedule and publish posts

• Organize all media and content libraries

• Maintain a consistent posting schedule



Bilingual Content



Our business operates in French and English, so you must be able to:



• Write posts in English and French

• Translate or adapt content between both languages

• Ensure messaging works naturally in both languages



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized and proactive

• Comfortable taking ownership and making suggestions

• Experienced with retail or food-related brands

• Able to manage multiple store locations

• Creative but also structured and professional



You should be able to say:



“Here is the marketing plan, here is the content calendar, and here is what we should be posting.”



Not wait for instructions for every post.



Required Experience



Please apply only if you have experience in most of the following:



• Social media strategy and management

• Professional graphic design

• Instagram reels and video editing

• Content planning and scheduling

• Branding and marketing design

• Bilingual English / French writing



Nice to Have



• Experience working with retail or supermarkets

• Experience designing weekly flyers or promotional ads

• Experience managing multiple business locations

• Experience with Shopify or e-commerce marketing



To Apply



Please include:



Links to social media accounts you currently manage



A portfolio of graphic design work



Examples of reels or video content you created



Your monthly salary expectation



Your favorite grocery store brand and why



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Position Details



Location: Remote

Hours: Gig, part-time or full-time

Salary: Based on experience



If you are someone who enjoys building a brand, creating beautiful content, and growing a business, we would love to hear from you.

title: Healthcare Staffing Recruiter
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for a motivated Healthcare Staffing Recruiter to join our medical staffing company. The Recruiter will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and hiring qualified healthcare professionals to meet client needs. This role requires strong communication, relationship-building skills, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment. 



Key Responsibilities:



Source and recruit qualified healthcare professionals through job boards, databases, referrals, and networking.

Conduct interviews, screen candidates, and verify qualifications.

Manage the hiring process from application to placement.

Build and maintain relationships with candidates and clients.

Collaborate with compliance and scheduling teams to ensure smooth onboarding.

Meet staffing goals and maintain a strong pipeline of healthcare talent.

 

Required Skills and Qualifications:



Previous recruiting experience; healthcare staffing experience strongly preferred.

Must be familiar with VMS, ATS softwares

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and negotiation skills.

Proficiency with applicant tracking systems, recruiting platforms, and Microsoft Office Suite.

Ability to work in a target-driven, deadline-oriented environment.

title: Expert AI Video Creator & TikTok Strategist (BookTok/Affiliate Style)
description:
I am a romance author looking for an AI video expert to help me dominate "BookTok" and other social platforms. I need someone who understands viral hook psychology and can create high-impact, faceless videos featuring book characters and atmospheric vibes.







What you’ll do:





* AI Video Production: Use tools like Nano Banana, Freepik, and Capcut to create cinematic, affiliate-style videos that stop the scroll.





* Creative Freedom: You will post across different accounts, analyze the data, and teach me what is trending so we can pivot our strategy based on what works.





* Viral Psychology: You understand how to hook a viewer in the first 3 seconds and keep them watching.





* Data-Driven: We will look at the numbers together and use those insights to create even more viral content.







Requirement: You must be an expert in AI video creation tools and understand the "BookTok" aesthetic.







To show me you have read this entire post, please start your application by answering this question in exactly one word: What is your favorite AI tool?

title: Author Operations Manager & Growth Apprentice
description:
I am a spicy romance author looking for an enthusiastic, tech-curious "Right Hand" to help me run and grow my business. If you are a fast learner who is "always online" and wants to see how a modern book brand works, this is for you.







What you’ll do:





* Fan & Author Connection: Manage my inbox, respond to fans, and coordinate with other authors for fun collaborations.





* Growth: Help me reach more readers by sending weekly newsletters and managing group promos.





* Quality Control: Listen to my high-quality AI audiobooks to ensure every pronunciation is perfect.





* Learning: I will teach you everything from managing systems to eventually helping with book cover designs.







To show me you have read this entire post, please start your application by answering this question in exactly one word: What is the most-used app on your phone?

title: Professional Fiction & Continuity Editor (Spicy Romance)
description:
I am a writer of spicy romance novels, and I am looking for a professional editor to help me polish my drafts. These are fun, fast-paced stories (3-hour reads), and I need someone with a professional background in editing books or papers to ensure they are publishing-ready.







What you’ll do:





* Provide a professional first-pass edit focusing on story flow, plot holes, and continuity.





* Manage feedback from my team of beta readers, d
 which suggestions to incorporate and thanking them for their help.





* You have the creative freedom to suggest additions or tweaks that make the story even more captivating for readers.





* I will personally train you on how to use AI tools to make the editing process faster and more enjoyable.







Requirement: You must love reading romance and have previous experience in professional editing.







To show me you have read this entire post, please start your application by answering this question in exactly one word: What is your favorite romance trope?

title: Video Content Creator & Editor
description:
Viaduct Generations is a purpose-driven AI search optimisation agency based in Shoreditch, London. We help B2B firms get found in Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI-powered search. We’re a small, fast-moving team that punches well above its weight.



We’re relaunching a podcast (The Wise Build Bridges) and video content programme targeting senior decision-makers in the UK professional services sector. This isn’t a generic content play — it’s a core part of our sales engine. Every episode is designed to open doors with prospective clients, build the founder’s personal brand, and position Viaduct Generations as the authority on AI search visibility.

We need someone who can turn raw Riverside recordings into polished long-form episodes and attention-grabbing short-form clips that perform on LinkedIn, YouTube shorts, Tiktok and Instagram. You’ll be the person who makes our content look and feel like it belongs alongside the best B2B media brands — not like a scrappy agency side project.



What You’ll Do

Podcast Production (Primary)

Edit weekly podcast episodes recorded in Riverside — audio cleanup, video editing, transitions, lower thirds, intro/outro, and colour grading.

Produce the final long-form episode for YouTube and audio platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts).

Create 5–10 short-form clips per episode (60–90 seconds each), optimised for LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.

Design and produce eye-catching thumbnails for YouTube and social platforms.

Manage the full post-production workflow — from raw recording to published assets — with minimal oversight.

Short-Form Content Creation

Create scroll-stopping clips with dynamic captions, motion graphics, and visual hooks that drive engagement — not just cuts of talking heads.

Stay current with platform trends, formats, and editing styles across LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok.

Test and iterate on content formats based on performance data — what’s getting views, watch time, and engagement.

Growth Path (3–6 Months)

Take on additional content creation responsibilities: LinkedIn carousels, static graphics, and promotional assets.

Support the development and execution of paid social campaigns (Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads) — creating ad creative and assisting with copy.

Contribute to founder marketing content — helping shape the visual identity of the founder’s personal brand across platforms.

Eventually manage content calendars and coordinate publishing schedules across all channels.

What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves

Proven experience editing podcast or interview-format video content. Riverside experience is a strong advantage.

Strong portfolio of short-form video content (Reels, Shorts, TikToks) that demonstrates creative flair — not just basic cuts.

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. Familiarity with After Effects or CapCut for motion graphics.

Excellent audio editing skills — noise removal, levelling, EQ, and mastering for podcast-quality output.

Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality. We’re a small team and speed matters.

Ability to work UK timezone hours (approximately 3pm–12am Manila time).

Strong written and spoken English — you’ll need to understand B2B content nuance and suggest captions or copy.

When sending your application, please include the word “pineapple” so we know your attention to detail is great.

Nice-to-Haves

Experience creating content for B2B or professional services audiences (not just lifestyle or entertainment).

Familiarity with Canva, Figma, or similar design tools for thumbnails and social graphics.

Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, or similar).

Basic understanding of paid social (Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager) — or willingness to learn.

Interest in AI, technology, or digital marketing.



How to Apply

Send us the following:

Your portfolio or showreel — specifically showing podcast/interview editing AND short-form content. If you don’t have podcast work, send your best long-form video edit.

Links to 2–3 short-form clips you’re most proud of, with a sentence on why each one works.

A brief note (3–4 sentences) on why this role interests you and what you’d bring to it. 

Your availability to start.

We review applications within 48 hours. If there’s a fit, we’ll move fast.





About Viaduct Generation

Viaduct Generations is a Better Business Network member. We donate a % of our profits to charity and actively amplify businesses led by underrepresented groups. We believe in embedded collaboration, not distant supplier relationships. If you want to do meaningful work with a team that genuinely cares about impact, you’ll fit in here.

Communication

title: Shopify/Gempages Long Form Sales Page/Product Page Builder
description:
Company: Project #1 Nutrition

Website: 

Primary Product (Phase 1): P1-TEST (Testosterone Support Supplement) - 



Overview



We’re a sports nutrition brand looking for a skilled Shopify/GemPages builder to create a high-converting, long-form sales landing page for our product P1-TEST. This page will be used for cold traffic from Instagram/Facebook ads and must feel like a premium gym/sports nutrition brand (not clinical).



If this project goes well, we have additional products and pages we’ll want you to build.



What you will build (Phase 1)



A long-form sales landing page in GemPages (Shopify) that includes:

 • Strong above-the-fold hero with offer + CTAs

 • Pain-point/problem section aligned to ad creatives (e.g., low energy, brain fog, low motivation, performance)

 • Clear benefit sections (compliant supplement language)

 • Patented ingredient section (KSM-66®, PrimaVie®, Cellflo6®, BioPerine®)

 • Supplement Facts / label section (image + layout)

 • “How to take” section

 • Reviews/testimonials section (we will provide assets)

 • FAQ section (including “Skip/Cancel Anytime” subscription language)

 • Repeated CTAs + sticky mobile CTA bar

 • Purchase module wired to Shopify product + subscription option



Offer details

 • One-time price: $99.95

 • Subscription price: $59.97

 • Subscription terms: Skip/Cancel anytime (no formal guarantee)



Required skills

 • Proven Shopify landing page experience

 • Strong GemPages (v7 preferred) build skills

 • Experience wiring product pages to Shopify checkout (ATC/Buy Now)

 • Comfortable implementing subscription purchase options (Shopify Subscriptions or 3rd-party; we will confirm which)

 • Basic CRO understanding: above-the-fold, CTA placement, mobile-first layout, page speed

 • Ability to follow brand vibe: gym/sports nutrition, premium, modern

 • Good English copy formatting (we’ll provide copy direction; you polish + implement cleanly)



Compliance (must follow)



This is a dietary supplement. You must avoid medical claims, diagnosis language, or “treat/cure” wording. You must include the standard FDA disclaimer on the page. If you have experience building compliant supplement pages, mention it. Please put the words yellow elephant in the subject line of your message or your application will not be considered. 



Deliverables

 1. A complete GemPages landing page draft in our Shopify store

 2. Mobile + desktop optimized layouts

 3. All sections built with reusable blocks/styles (so we can duplicate for other products)

 4. Basic on-page tracking readiness (UTM-friendly; optional: Meta Pixel/GA events if you have experience)

 5. A short handoff document or Loom video explaining:

 • what you built

 • where to edit text/images

 • how to duplicate the page for another product



What we provide

 • Product images (new label), supplement facts, brand assets

 • Examples of competitor page structures we like (for layout inspiration only)



Time & pay

 • Initial project: 1 landing page

 • Ongoing work available if the first page performs well



To apply (IMPORTANT)



Reply with:

 1. 2–5 examples of Shopify/GemPages landing pages you built (links + what you did)

 2. Your fixed price for 1 long-form landing page (and what’s included)

 3. What subscription tools you’ve worked with (Recharge, Skio, Appstle, Shopify Subscriptions, etc.)

 4. Confirm you can build mobile-first and keep it fast

 5. A brief note on how you approach supplement claim compliance



Bonus: If you can also create/optimize ad-to-page message match and build A/B variations, mention it.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Company: Cima Financial

Job Title: Accountant

Location: Remote

Hours: Monday to Friday from 8 AM to 5 PM PST

Compensation: $12 per hour



About Us:

Cima Financial is a specialized financial services group that provides liquidity solutions, credit, and payment processing. We are best known for helping businesses manage the complexities of cross-border trade and high-volume transactions.



About the Role:

As an accountant you will serve as the essential financial navigator and strategic conscience of an organization. While leadership determines the company's ultimate destination, the accountant provides the map, monitors the resources, and identifies potential hazards long before they manifest. By meticulously recording the past through precise financial statements and tax compliance, the accountant establishes an indisputable "source of truth." In the present, the accountant acts as guardians of integrity, implementing rigorous internal controls to prevent fraud and ensuring the business remains firmly within the bounds of global regulatory standards.



Requirements:

          * 1 year of experience in a similar capacity.

          * English Fluent, both written and verbal.

          * Types 35 words per minute.

          * High level of work ethic, professionalism, punctuality, and reliability.

          * Proficient in using computers, software, and other relevant tools. 

Ability to adapt to changing priorities and processes.

Capable of working independently and as part of a team.

Meticulous attention to detail, and accuracy while multitasking.

Ability to handle confidential information with integrity.

Stays current with industry trends and advancement.

Effective at time-management and organizational skills.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Charismatic and influential leadership abilities.

JD - Accountant
Key Responsibilities:

Financial Reporting and Accuracy

Extract, clean, and analyze large datasets from various tools and consolidate them to a master database.

Develop and maintain insightful reports and dashboards.

Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in data to provide actionable recommendations for operational improvements.

Regulatory Compliance and Taxation

Ensure data accuracy and integrity across all reports and analyses.

Strategic Analysis and Forecasting

Risk Management and Internal Controls



What We Offer:

Competitive salary and benefits package.

Opportunities for professional development and career growth.

A supportive and collaborative work environment.

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses

We do not review platfor
ssages.

title: Guest Support for Short Term Rental Company
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Guest Support & Operations Analyst to manage overnight guest communications and support key backend operations. This role combines guest relations, reservation management, and administrative tasks to ensure seamless service and operational accuracy.



IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THIS ROLE

- This is NOT a generic support role.

- You’ll be juggling guests, cleaners, and maintenance teams in real time — often with imperfect information and real consequences if poor decisions are made. Because of that, our hiring process is intentionally more challenging than a typical “message responder” position.

- The assessment you’re about to take is designed to understand how you think — how you prioritize, communicate, and make judgment calls when there isn’t one obvious right answer.

- If you enjoy solving realistic scenarios, thinking critically, and taking ownership, you will likely enjoy both this assessment and the job itself. If you are looking for a simple, scripted support role, this probably won’t be the right fit — and that’s okay.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Guest Communications & Support

- Respond promptly and professionally to booking inquiries, guest messages, and support requests across multiple platforms.

- Provide phone support to address urgent guest needs and ensure timely issue resolution.

- Collaborate with the operations team to facilitate smooth check-ins, check-outs, and overall guest satisfaction.



Operational & Administrative Support

- Perform booking cleanup, ensuring reservations are accurate and conflicts are resolved.

- Conduct guest cleanup by maintaining accurate records and organizing guest profiles.

- Manage listing accuracy and resolve platform-related issues across Airbnb, 
, Expedia, etc.

- Support accounting functions, including expense tracking, invoice updates, and discrepancy reporting.

- Assist in lead management, including organizing, qualifying, and supporting follow-up efforts for potential property acquisition opportunities.



Qualifications

- Experience with short-term rental platforms (Airbnb, 
, Vrbo, etc.).

- Strong communication skills and professional phone etiquette.

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational abilities.

Upload your resume here >>>

title: Medical Virtual Assistant

Looking for a Lead Generation/Sales Development Rep who is responsible, diligent and organised to hunt for leads, and work on outbound lead generation using LinkedIN and
. You job involves creating and nurturing LinkedIn accounts,  prospecting for and researching on quality leads, making connections via
 and LinkedIN, sending well-crafted personalised messages, and engaging with connections to sell our product, and setting demo appointments. title: Sales Development Specialist (GoHighLevel)
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Sales Development Specialist (SDR)

Location: Remote (Chicago Time Zone preferred)

Hours: Part-Time (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CT) with potential to grow into Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Commission (performance-based incentives)



About the Role

This is not a general admin role. We are looking for a sales-focused, proactive virtual assistant who can:

- Generate leads and fill the sales pipeline

- Cold call and connect with potential clients (especially small law firms)

- Manage communication and onboarding of new clients

- Take ownership of results with minimal supervision

- You will play a critical role in helping the business grow by reaching more potential clients and increasing revenue.



Key Responsibilities

- Conduct outbound calls to potential clients to introduce services

- Generate qualified leads and maintain the sales pipeline in HighLevel CRM

- Assist with client onboarding (Zoom calls, account setup, and workflow guidance) as needed

 campaigns

- Take initiative and continuously improve outreach strategies



Why Join the Team?

- Opportunity to take ownership and shape your role

- Earn commission based on performance

- Grow with the business as responsibilities and opportunities expand



How to Apply

Please submit your application including:

title: Professional Livestream Sales Host - Shopee Mall - OBS & Multi-Cam (WFH)
description:
Job Description:

We are a global footwear brand and a verified Shopee Mall seller. We are looking for a high-energy, tech-savvy Livestream Sales Host in the Philippines for a long-term, flexible partnership. 



This is a Work-From-Home (WFH) position. You will be responsible for hosting live sessions on our Shopee official store, focusing on the comfort and technology of our functional footwear.



Key Responsibilities:

- Host 2-5 live sessions per week (2 hours per session).

- Operate OBS independently: Switch between camera angles (Face cam vs. Close-up shoe/walking cam) to show product details and fit.

- Drive sales through engaging storytelling and professional product demonstration.

- Explain functional features to viewers.



Compensation Structure (Performance-Based):

- Trial Period: Paid trial sessions will be conducted before confirming long-term cooperation.

- Base Pay: $8-$15 per session (Paid bi-weekly or monthly).

- Performance Commission: Tiered commission structure based on sales targets achieved.

- Earning Potential: Top hosts can earn $50 - $100+ per session during peak traffic or mega campaigns.



Requirements:

1. Experience: Proven track record in E-commerce livestreaming (Shopee, TikTok, or Lazada). Experience in footwear or functional products is a huge plus.

2. Technical Setup (Must-Have):

    - A PC/Laptop capable of running OBS smoothly.

    - Multi-Camera Setup: At least two HD cameras (one for your face, one for floor-level shoe demos).

    - High-speed Fiber Internet with a backup plan.

    - Professional lighting and a clean, dedicated streaming space.

3. Communication: Fluent in English and Tagalog. Ability to sell with enthusiasm and authority.



How to Apply:

Please send your application with:

1. Video Demo: Send a 1-minute clip of you selling any pair of shoes. Show us how you handle the transition from talking to showing the shoes on your feet.

2. Setup Photo: A photo of your OBS interface and dual-camera setup.

3. Speedtest: A screenshot of your current internet speed.

4. CV & Portfolio: Clips of your past livestreams.

title: Superstar VA
description:
Are you a sharp, resourceful, and multi-talented Virtual Assistant ready to level up with a fast-growing tradie business?

We’re on the lookout for a Superstar VA who can juggle admin, socials, quoting, project tracking, and basic bookkeeping — all while keeping things running smoothly behind the scenes.



If you’re organised, proactive, and love being the go-to person who holds it all together, we want to hear from you.



What We’re Looking For:

Admin ninja – you can manage calendars, job boards, and team comms with your eyes closed

Detail-focused operator – timelines, paperwork, and project notes are always tidy and on point

Social-savvy communicator – you know how to write engaging captions, schedule posts, and talk to leads

Basic video & design skills – Canva, Reels/TikToks, and photo briefs are second nature

Finance-friendly – you’re confident with Xero/QuickBooks, quoting, follow-ups, and basic reports

Self-starter – you take initiative, solve problems, and don’t need hand-holding

Strong written and spoken English – clear, professional, and friendly communication is a must



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus):

Experience working with tradies or construction-based businesses

Familiar with tools like Notion, Calendly, Meta Suite, Canva, and CapCut or Premiere

Basic understanding of SWMS, prestart checklists, or quoting processes

Previous experience handling lead generation or client onboarding



What You’ll Be Doing:

Managing the company calendar and scheduling crew/jobs

Updating job boards and tracking project timelines

Uploading site photos, notes, and timesheets

Preparing checklists, SWMS, and job paperwork

Publishing and scheduling content across Instagram,
, and TikTok

Writing captions, responding to messages, and sending cold DMs to leads

Editing basic videos (reels, before/afters) and designing simple graphics

Preparing quotes, updating CRMs, and tracking variations

Entering expenses, reconciling accounts, and chasing overdue invoices

Generating basic financial reports and supporting BAS prep



Why Join Us?

Work with a growing and supportive team that values your input

Flexible hours and long-term potential

Real impact — help streamline a busy tradie business and make a difference

Competitive pay based on experience and performance

We treat our VAs like tea
mbers, not task robots

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a senior industry leader across both a consulting practice and a creative music career. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and enjoys balancing strategic business support with creative coordination.



The Executive Virtual Assistant will act as a trusted right hand, managing day-to-day operations, scheduling, communications, and project coordination. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to multifamily operations, PropTech, and consulting work, while also supporting initiatives within the music industry. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, resourceful, and comfortable handling multiple priorities with discretion and professionalism.





Consulting & Business Operations Responsibilities: 



* Social Media & Content Management: 

Manage LinkedIn content calendar following established weekly posting strategy

Schedule and publish content across platforms using Dripify and other automation tools

Monitor engagement and flag opportunities for relationship building



* Podcast Scheduling & Coordination: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for PropTech Pulse (multifamily PropTech) and Purpose Built (personal transformation) podcasts

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and pre-interview logistics

Coordinate recording schedules and send calendar invitations

Prepare guest briefing materials and episode outlines

Track episode pipeline and maintain production calendar

Coordinate podcast promotion across social channels for all shows



* Speaking & Workshop Development: 

Research and apply to speaking opportunities at industry conferences (NMHC, NAA, Apartmentalize, regional events)

Track submission deadlines, requirements, and follow-up communications

Promote and book workshops, managing logistics and attendee communications

Coordinate The Diplomat's Table quarterly executive events



* CRM & Client Nurturing: 

Maintain CRM database with accurate contact information and engagement history

Execute nurturing sequences for prospects across six LinkedIn outreach lanes

Schedule discovery calls via Calendly Professional

Prepare briefing documents for client meetings



* Administrative & Financial: 

Manage calendar and scheduling using Microsoft Outlook

Prepare and send monthly client invoices

Track accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments

Compile monthly business reports and KPI tracking

Handle
 correspondence and prioritize inbox



* Website & Digital Platform Management: 

Coordinate website design and development projects with designers/developers

Manage website content updates, blog posts, and landing pages

Set up and maintain virtual training platform (course uploads, user management, content organization)

Manage ecommerce platform for workshops, courses, and digital products

Monitor platform performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate technical support

Track enrollment, sales metrics, and customer inquiries



* Music Career Responsibilities: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for House Call music podcast

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and recording logistics for House Call

Manage social media presence and content calendar for music brand

Research and submit tracks to record labels and A&R contacts

Submit songs to playlist curators (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

Coordinate release promotion campaigns for new tracks

Track streaming metrics and engagement across platforms

Research marketing opportunities and music industry events





Required Qualifications:

7+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a marketing/communications support role

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field preferred

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail

Proficiency with LinkedIn, social media scheduling tools, and CRM platforms

Experience with website content management systems (WordPress, Squarespace, or similar)

Familiarity with online course platforms (Thinkific, Teachable, Kajabi) and/or ecommerce tools

Strong written and verbal communication skills with professional polish

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

Self-starter who anticipates needs, takes initiative, and operates with minimal supervision

Experience coordinating podcasts, media appearances, or content production





Preferred Qualifications:

Experience supporting executives in professional services, consulting, or thought leadership roles

Familiarity with real estate, PropTech, or B2B industries

Background in music industry marketing, artist management, or entertainment

Experience with invoicing, basic bookkeeping, or accounts receivable

Knowledge of conference speaking circuits and event promotion





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Junior Local SEO Specialist
description:
About Paint & Profits



Paint & Profits is a marketing agency that helps local service businesses grow through SEO and digital marketing. Most of our clients are painting contractors, along with other companies in the home improvement and home services industry. Our work focuses heavily on local SEO, helping these businesses rank in their service areas, generate more calls and quote requests, and consistently grow their pipeline of jobs.



Hours: 40 hrs/week (8 hrs/day)

Compensation: Competitive (based on experience) + performance growth path

Start: ASAP

Tools required: Time Doctor + daily logbook + weekly reporting



What you’ll do



You will help improve local rankings and website performance for service-area and location-based businesses. Your work will be hands-on, tactical, and measured weekly.



Core responsibilities

-Keyword research focused on local intent (city + service, neighborhood intent, “near me,” etc.)

-Find content gaps and opportunities (services missing, location pages missing, weak pages that need upgrades)

-Create and optimize hyper-local pages (service + city pages done right, not spam)

-Write and update content (blogs, service pages, FAQs) with strong on-page SEO

-Rewrite underperforming pages to improve rankings and conversions

-Improve on-page SEO: titles, headings, internal linking, schema basics, content structure

-Track keywords and report on progress weekly (what changed, what you shipped, what’s next)

-Identify and document issues holding sites back (technical basics, indexation, cannibalization, weak internal linking, poor page intent match)



What “good” looks like here



-You can explain why a keyword is worth targeting, and what page should target it

-You can find gaps quickly and turn them into a clean 90-day plan

-You ship consistently and keep a clean record (Time Doctor + daily logbook)

-You think local-first (maps/local intent), not national SEO or ecommerce playbooks



Requirements



-Fluent English (written + spoken)

-Comfortable writing and editing pages (clear, human writing)

-Strong keyword research skills (not just pulling lists, but choosing winners)

-Basic working knowledge of Google Search Console + GA4

-Organized: logbooks, weekly reporting, monthly goals



Nice to have



-Experience with service businesses (home services, local professional services, etc.)

-Experience with WordPress or similar CMS

-Basic understanding of technical SEO fundamentals (indexing, canonicals, duplicates, internal linking)



How we manage work (non-negotiable)



-Time Doctor tracking during work hours

-Daily logbook (what you did, time spent, output links)

-Weekly summary report to your manager

-Monthly goals with clear deliverables



To apply



Send:

-Your resume or LinkedIn

-A short note describing your local SEO experience

-1 example: a page you improved or a plan you created

title: Grade 5 Math Tutor (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote (PST Time Zone)

Schedule: 5:00 PM PST, 1-hour session per day (Monday - Thursday)



Job Description:

We are looking for a reliable and enthusiastic Grade 5 Math Tutor to work with a 10-year-old student. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of Grade 5 math concepts, including arithmetic, fractions, decimals, geometry, and introductory algebra.



The tutor will be responsible for helping the student improve their math skills by explaining concepts, providing practice problems, and supporting their overall academic development.



Responsibilities:

Provide 1-hour tutoring sessions focused on Grade 5 math topics, Monday through Thursday.

Explain math concepts in a clear, patient, and engaging manner.

Assist with homework and practice problems.

Adapt teaching methods to fit the student’s learning style and pace.

Track progress and give feedback on performance.

Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Requirements:

Experience tutoring math at the elementary school level (preferably Grade 5).

Strong knowledge of the U.S. Grade 5 Math Curriculum (arithmetic, fractions, decimals, geometry, and basic algebra).

Reliable and consistent availability for 1-hour sessions at 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Thursday.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to work effectively with children.

A positive and patient attitude toward teaching.



Compensation:

Starting rate: $6/hour.

Rate increase to $7/hour after 30 days of successful tutoring.



How to Apply:

If you're passionate about helping a student succeed in math and meet the above qualifications, please apply by sending:



- Your resume.

- A brief description of your tutoring experience.

- A video link introduction telling us about your teaching style and why you would be a good fit for this role.

- A portfolio (if applicable), including any reviews from past clients, and relevant materials or examples of previous tutoring work.

- Include the word "MDN" when submitting an application to be considered. For example: Grade 5 Math Tutor - MDN



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: AI OPERATIONS & CLIENT AUTOMATION SPECIALIST (REMOTE – PHILIPPINES)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a specialised AI and messaging automation agency building stable, well-governed automation systems for businesses using messaging platforms, AI agents, and workflow automation.

This is not a volume agency and not a generic VA setup.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This role focuses on client automation setup and optimisation, AI agent configuration, testing, and adjustments, monitoring live systems, and handling i
 calmly. It also includes clear escalation to internal leads and platform support teams when required.



This is not a traditional customer support or inbox management role.

You will not be responding to end-customer enquiries or managing live chat queues.

Your focus is on supporting and maintaining client automation systems.

It is an operations and systems role involving logic, judgement, and responsibility.



You will receive structured on-the-job training and SOPs, but you must be comfortable learning and thinking independently.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



CLIENT SETUP & SYSTEM ADJUSTMENTS

Configure messaging platforms, automations, and AI agents

Implement changes based on documented instructions

Review existing setups and flag potential issues or improvements

Ensure agents behave safely and within defined rules



MONITORING & I
 HANDLING

Monitor for unexpected agent behaviour or automation failures

Triage issues methodically without panic

Apply containment actions such as pausing flows or triggering human takeover

Escalate issues with clear evidence and summaries



COMMUNICATION & DOCUMENTATION

Provide clear written updates during i
 or changes

Translate technical issues into simple explanations

Document changes, i
, and resolutions clearly



WORKING EXPECTATIONS

This is a remote, work-from-home role

On-the-job training will be provided

You are expected to self-learn platform features and documentation

Occasionally, urgent issues may arise outside standard hours. These are not daily and follow a clear escalation process

You are not expected to solve everything, but you are expected to contain issues, document clearly, and escalate correctly



REQUIRED TRAITS

We care more about how you think than years of experience.



You should think logically and systematically

Stay calm when problems are unclear

Communicate clearly in writing

Take ownership without overstepping

Be comfortable saying ‘I am not sure yet, but here is what I am checking’



REQUIRED SKILLS

Strong written English

Comfort using web-based SaaS platforms

Logical problem-solving ability

Ability to follow and improve SOPs

Willingness to learn AI agents and automation systems



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with chat platforms or messaging systems

Experience with automation tools like 
 or Zapier

Background in technical support, QA, or operations



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

Not a sales role
