title: Real Estate Lead List Builder / Public Records Research VA
description:
About Us



Polus Acquisitions Group is a U.S.-based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in identifying motivated sellers through public records and government data, building relationships with property owners, and negotiating contracts that allow us to purchase properties quickly.



Our team operates remotely and collaborates closely across several roles including data research, lead generation, marketing, and acquisitions. The success of our acquisitions team depends heavily on the quality and consistency of the data we generate.



We are looking for a Real Estate Data Manager / Lead Generation Specialist who understands how to navigate U.S. county public records, generate property owner leads, and manage those leads throughout our system until they are ready for our acquisitions team.



This is a long-term position with growth opportunities for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and capable of working as part of a team.



Compensation



Base Salary: $400 per month



Paid bi-weekly (every two weeks).



In addition to base salary, bonuses are paid when contracts are closed from leads you generated and managed.



Bonus structure follows the same performance tiers used by our acquisitions team and rewards consistent production.



Bonuses are applied once contracts are successfully signed and closed from leads that originated from your data and outreach work.



This means your performance and accuracy directly contribute to the company’s growth and your earning potential.



Schedule



Full-time position



Monday – Friday

40 hours per week



Some overlap with U.S. business hours may be required depending on workflow and communication with the team.



How Our Company Operates



Our company operates on a data-driven lead generation system that focuses on identifying property owners who may be motivated to sell.



Our process begins with public records research, where we identify property owners through county government databases. These records are then organized, verified, and prepared for outreach.



Once leads are generated, our marketing systems reach out to those property owners through SMS campaigns and phone calls. If a homeowner is interested in selling, the lead is passed to our acquisitions team who negotiates and closes the deal.



Your role is critical in ensuring that the entire pipeline runs smoothly and consistently produces high-quality leads.



What You Will Be Doing

County Public Records Research



You will regularly navigate U.S. county websites to locate property records and government filings.



Examples include:



• Probate filings

• Tax delinquent properties

• Pre-foreclosures / foreclosure filings

• Code violations

• Property transfers

• Evictions



These records are used to identify property owners who may be motivated to sell.



You must be comfortable navigating:



• County clerk websites

• District clerk court records

• Property appraisal districts

• Tax assessor databases

• Recorder / deed records



Lead Data Collection



Once records are located, you will gather and organize key information including:



• Property address

• Owner name

• Mailing address

• Parcel / APN number

• Filing information (when applicable)



Accuracy is extremely important because this data is used by our marketing and acquisitions teams.



Data Cleaning & Organization



You will prepare datasets by:



• Removing duplicates

• Standardizing addresses

• Verifying ownership information

• Formatting spreadsheets for CRM import



The goal is to produce clean, reliable data that can be used for marketing campaigns.



Skip Tracing



After property owner data is collected, you will assist with skip tracing to locate contact information for property owners.



This may include:



• Phone numbers

•
 addresses

• Additional ownership data



Tools used may include:



• SmartSkip

• BatchSkipTracing

• TruePeopleSearch

• Other skip tracing tools



SMS Lead Generation



Once leads are prepared, they are uploaded into our CRM and marketing systems.



From there we conduct SMS outreach campaigns to contact property owners and determine whether they are interested in selling.



You may assist with:



• Preparing lead lists for SMS campaigns

• Managing responses from property owners

• Organizing conversations in the CRM

• Identifying interested sellers



Lead Management



If a property owner expresses interest in selling, the lead must be carefully documented and passed to the acquisitions team.



This includes:



• Updating the CRM with accurate notes

• Organizing seller information

• Communicating updates to the acquisitions team



Your role is to ensure no leads are lost and every opportunity is tracked correctly.



What It Takes to Succeed Here

Attention to Detail



The entire operation relies on clean data. Small mistakes in records can cause major problems later in the process.



Consistency



Our marketing systems depend on a steady supply of leads. We need someone who can reliably produce new data each week.



Problem Solving



County websites can sometimes be difficult to navigate. You must be capable of researching and figuring out how to locate the necessary information.



Team Communication



We operate as a team. Clear communication and updates are essential so that everyone understands what is happening in the pipeline.



You must be comfortable collaborating with:



• Data team members

• Lead managers

• Acquisitions specialists



Requirements



• Experience researching U.S. county public records

• Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Experience cleaning and organizing data

• Familiarity with real estate data or lead generation

• Understanding of property ownership records

• Ability to manage and track leads in a CRM

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment

• Strong English communication skills



Ideal Candidate



The best candidate will:



• Have experience working with real estate investors or wholesalers

• Understand how motivated seller lead generation works

• Be highly organized and detail-oriented

• Be proactive and reliable

• Be comfortable working with large datasets



Why Join Our Team



This position provides an opportunity to become part of a growing real estate investment company and play a key role in generating the opportunities that drive our business.



You will gain valuable experience in:



• Real estate investing

• Lead generation systems

• Data management

• Property research



Top performers will have opportunities for long-term growth and increased responsibilities within the company.



How to Apply (Important)



To apply, please follow these instructions carefully.




 your application to: 



Subject Line: Real Estate Data Manager Application – OJPH



Attach your resume with relevant experience



Include a 1–2 minute video or audio introduction explaining your experience with real estate data or public records research



At the top of your application, include the words:



“DATA PIPELINE”



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be considered.

title: AI Search & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are hiring an AI Search & Digital Marketing Specialist to lead the evolution of our marketing efforts into the next generation of search and digital visibility.



This role goes beyond traditional marketing. We are looking for someone who is excited about leveraging AI-driven search, automation, data insights, and emerging digital tools to give our company a competitive edge. As search continues shifting toward AI-powered results, generative answers, and conversational discovery, this person will help ensure our company is visible, trusted, and positioned ahead of competitors.



You will own and execute strategies that improve our presence across:

-Traditional Google search

-Local search and Google Business Profile

-AI-driven search experiences

-Organic content ecosystems

-Social media and digital trust signals



This is a hands-on, growth-focused role for someone who wants to be on the cutting edge of AI-powered marketing while still mastering the fundamentals of SEO, content, and local visibility that drive real revenue. We are not looking for someone to simply “manage posts.” We are looking for someone who wants to help build a modern, AI-informed marketing engine inside a growing home improvement company.



Responsibilities



-AI Visibility & Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)

-Develop and execute strategies to improve our visibility in AI-driven search platforms and generative answer engines

-Structure website and content to increase the likelihood of being cited in AI-generated results

-Monitor how our brand and services appear in AI search experiences and recommend improvements

-Identify content gaps based on AI-generated responses and customer search behavior

-Implement structured content, schema guidance, and entity clarity to improve machine understanding of our business

-Audit website pages for SEO, readability, user experience, and conversion opportunities



Content & Digital Presence



-Create and optimize service pages, location pages, blogs, FAQs, and project case studies

-Manage a content calendar aligned with homeowner questions and seasonal demand

-Support social media and digital brand visibility initiatives



Reviews & Reputation



-Build and manage a review generation process

-Respond to and monitor online reviews

-Gather testimonials, before/after stories, and customer-facing trust content



Reporting & Growth



-Track performance across search visibility, AI appearances, reviews, and lead activity

-Provide clear monthly reporting and recommendations



This position requires answering short questions about marketing and AI strategy during the application process. Applications without completed responses may not be considered. Please include your answers to the following questions with your application. 



Visit our website: 

List 3 improvements that would help this company appear more often in search results or AI-generated answers.



List 5 website content topics you would create for a roofing/siding/home exterior company to attract homeowners researching projects. For each topic, include:

-Title

-Type of content (blog, FAQ, guide, etc.)

-Why would it attract potential customers?



Many companies have happy customers, but very few online reviews.

What 3 systems or processes would you implement to consistently generate more reviews?

title: YouTube Video Editor for Real Estate Channel (Long Form + Shorts Repurposing)
description:
Job Overview



I’m looking for a skilled YouTube video editor to help edit content for a growing real estate YouTube channel.



The channel produces two long-form videos per week, and I’m looking for someone who can also repurpose those videos into multiple short-form clips for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.



My goal is to work with someone long-term who can deliver high-quality edits with a reasonably fast turnaround time.



If you are experienced with YouTube content editing and understand pacing, storytelling, and attention retention, this could be a great fit.



?



Content Schedule



Each week you will be editing:



Long Form Content

 • 2 YouTube videos per week

 • Upload schedule:

 • Wednesday

 • Saturday



Short Form Content

 • Repurpose the long-form videos into 5–10 short-form clips per week

 • Shorts will be used for:

 • YouTube Shorts

 • Instagram Reels

 • TikTok



?



Editing Style



The editing style should be:

 • Clean and professional

 • Engaging pacing that holds viewer attention

 • Use of zoom cuts, b-roll, graphics, captions, and transitions when appropriate

 • Optimized for YouTube and social media



Experience editing YouTube talking-head style content is a big plus.



?



What I’m Looking For



I’m looking for someone who:

 • Has strong video editing skills

 • Understands YouTube pacing and retention editing

 • Can create high-quality edits

 • Can maintain consistent turnaround times

 • Is reliable and communicates well

 • Has experience creating short-form clips from long-form content



?



Software



You may use any professional editing software such as:

 • Premiere Pro

 • Final Cut

 • DaVinci Resolve

 • CapCut (Pro-level users welcome)



?



Turnaround Expectations



Once raw footage is provided, I’m looking for someone who can:

 • Deliver long-form edits within a reasonable timeframe

 • Consistently meet deadlines for the weekly upload schedule



Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality is very important.



?



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

 1. Your portfolio or examples of videos you’ve edited

 2. Links to YouTube videos or social media content you’ve worked on

 3. Your editing software

 4. Your typical turnaround time

 5. Your weekly availability



Applications without video examples or a portfolio will not be considered.



?



If you’re a great editor who understands YouTube content and short-form repurposing, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Media Buyer / Paid Ads Specialist
description:
MEDIA BUYER / PAID ADS SPECIALIST

Zeta Media | Remote (Philippines-based) | Full-time



---



ABOUT US



Zeta Media is a Singapore-based growth agency that helps SMBs across home services, dental, and creative education verticals generate leads and bookings through WhatsApp automation, CRM systems, and paid advertising.



We are looking for a sharp, data-driven media buyer based in the Philippines to launch, manage, and optimise paid ad campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads for up to 5 client accounts across different verticals.



---



THE VERTICALS YOU WILL WORK ACROSS



You will manage up to 5 client accounts across a mix of Singapore-based SMBs. Our current and incoming verticals include:



- Home improvement / renovation — Lead generation for showroom visits and renovation enquiries via Google Search and Meta

- Dental / healthcare — New patient acquisition for specific treatments (implants, Invisalign, veneers) via Google Search and Meta

- Children's enrichment / education — Class enrolments and event registrations targeting parents, primarily via Meta

- Dance / performing arts — Class sign-ups and trial bookings via Meta and Google



New accounts will be added over time as we onboard more clients. All clients are Singapore-based SMBs.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Plan, build, launch, and optimise Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max) across all client accounts

- Plan, build, launch, and optimise Meta Ads campaigns 
 and Instagram) including CTWA (click-to-WhatsApp) ad formats

- Set up and structure new Google Ads accounts and Meta Business Manager / ad accounts from scratch for new clients as they come onboard

- Work closely with our account managers to communicate campaign performance, recommendations, and updates to clients when needed

- Conduct keyword research, audience research, and competitor ad analysis for each vertical

- Write ad copy and headlines tailored to each client's brand voice and target audience

- Create and manage A/B tests for ad creatives, copy, audiences, and bidding strategies

- Set up and maintain conversion tracking (Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics 4)

- Monitor daily ad spend, CPC, CPL, CTR, and ROAS; flag anomalies early

- Deliver weekly performance reports with clear recommendations (not just data dumps)

- Coordinate with our design team for creative assets when needed

- Manage landing page traffic and recommend improvements based on ad performance data

- Stay current on platform updates, algorithm changes, and new ad formats



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 2+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads AND Meta Ads campaigns (not just boosted posts)

- Proven track record running lead generation campaigns, ideally for service-based businesses

- Strong working knowledge of Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max), Meta Ads Manager, and audience targeting

- Experience setting up and troubleshooting Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, and GA4 conversion events

- Comfortable setting up Google Ads accounts and Meta Business Manager / ad accounts from scratch, including billing, permissions, and domain verification

- Ability to write compelling ad copy that converts (not generic template copy)

- Comfortable managing SGD 3,000–15,000/month in combined ad spend across accounts

- Strong analytical skills: you can read the data, spot what is working, and explain why

- Excellent written English communication (you will be briefing the team and reporting to the founder directly)

- Self-starter who does not need to be chased for updates or results

- Based in the Philippines (this is a requirement)



---



BONUS (NICE TO HAVE)



- Experience with click-to-WhatsApp (CTWA) ad campaigns on Meta

- Familiarity with Singapore market, consumer behaviour, or local competitors

- Experience in any of these verticals: home improvement/renovation, dental/healthcare, or children's education

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma) for quick creative iterations

- Experience with landing page builders or basic HTML for LP tweaks

- Familiarity with CRM tools (
, GHL, HubSpot, or similar)



---



WORKING ARRANGEMENT



- Remote, Philippines-based, full-time (with a 1-month paid trial period)

- 40 hours per week with overlap during Singapore business hours (SGT, GMT+8)

- Monthly salary (to be discussed based on experience)

- Direct reporting to the founder



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with the following:



1. A brief introduction about yourself and your experience with Google and Meta Ads

2. Links to or screenshots of past campaign dashboards showing results you are proud of (anonymised is fine)

3. Your monthly rate expectation in PHP

4. Your availability (hours per week and preferred working hours)

5. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "If you were launching Google Ads for a dental clinic targeting patients who need dental implants in Singapore, what campaign type would you start with and why?"



Applications without the screening question answered will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3–5 working days. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short paid test task before a final interview.

title: VA - Local SEO Engineer
description:
LOCAL SEO ENGINEER

Contractor Kingdom | Remote | Full-Time | $1,000/month + Growth Opportunity 





BEFORE YOU READ FURTHER



This is not a data entry job. You won't be manually hunting directories or copying and pasting NAP info all day.



This is an AI-powered role. We've built Custom GPT systems, automated workflows, and smart tools to handle the heavy lifting. Your job is fine-tuning, quality control, and strategy execution, making sure the outputs are excellent.



If you're hungry to learn how modern local SEO is actually done, AI tools, GBP optimization, citations, rank tracking, this is the role.





WHO WE ARE



Contractor Kingdom is a full-service digital marketing company built exclusively for home service contractors : plumbers, HVAC techs, roofers, electricians, general contractors, and more.



We sell premium websites bundled with a 12-week Local SEO sprint that gets clients ranking on Google Maps before their site even launches. After the sprint, clients move to ongoing monthly retainers. We manage everything: GBP optimization, citation building, content, reviews, and rankings.



We're a small, fast-moving/growing team. When you join, you will own a real piece of the operation, not a task list handed down from five layers of management.





THE ROLE



You'll be the engine behind our Local SEO sprint and ongoing client management reporting to the strategist. You'll run the month-by-month process that takes a brand-new client from their level of GBP/ Entity presence and keep them climbing using our systems. 



You work with AI, not against it.

We've built Custom GPTs that generate GBP descriptions, category maps, post content, and product listings. Your job is to guide the AI, review the outputs, refine what's off, and ship what's excellent. Help us make the systems more efficient for you to operate without sacrificing Quality.



You manage real client accounts, with real results.

15 active GBP clients depend on weekly and monthly recurring work. You'll see rankings move, citation velocity grow, and heat maps shift because of what you did.



You have a path forward.

This role starts as Local SEO Engineer.  If you're ambitious, there's room to grow here.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Sprint Execution (12-Week Client Onboarding)



- Execute Month 1-2-3 Local SEO sprints using our step-by-step SOP

- Run GBP facelifts: categories, descriptions, media uploads, hours, service areas

- Submit data aggregators via Bright Local and track go-live confirmations

- Conduct baseline citation audits and populate the Citation Tracker accurately

- Build and claim aggregator profiles (Apple Maps, Bing, Yelp, BBB, Chamber, Expertise, etc.)

- Order Citations

- Complete SERP and competitor research 



Ongoing Weekly + Monthly Client Management



- Monitor and respond to all reviews every week

- Escalate negative reviews via 

- Check weekly rankings in 

- GBP posts

- Upload Provided 10-20 photos per client per month

- Run NAP entity audits and fix mismatches, Track, build Important Contractor Profiles (Yelp) 

- Pull  heat maps for client reporting

- Maintain accurate Citation Tracker and NAP Workbook for every client





TOOLS YOU'LL USE DAILY : Any Experience Preferred

title: Full-Time Tiktok / UGC Editor
description:
Editing VA hiring post:



Full-time Capcut / UGC / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





Very basic content - this will take up a majority of your workload and will consist of usually one main video thats about 5-10 minutes long, 1-2 photos that need to be addressed, and maybe a request to add a caption.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 6-8h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise, Zelle, Paypal, Cashapp, etc

PH or similar time zone



$500-800/month + bonuses 



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create this reference video:



Reference video: one reference video is in the google drive upper "edited chest" and then here is the link to the other: 



Google drive: 



Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video

title: Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager
description:
# Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager — Newsletter, Social Content & Creative

**CORE TOOLS:** Notion, Trello, Google Workspace,
, WhatsApp, Claude, Slack 



---



## WHO WE ARE



You'll be supporting day-to-day production operations across two companies run by the same creative leadership team.



1// The first is a **fintech and financial media company** producing a biweekly newsletter, short-form social video, and editorial content. We run a documented 14-day production cycle with defined phases and gates. Within 3 months, we're scaling to weekly — then launching a second newsletter — while running 30 days of social content calendar.



2// second is a **Brooklyn-based creative studio** doing creative services like branding, websites, photo/video production, equipment rentals, and content licensing. we need to prepare  production docs like SOWs, production briefs, photo galleries.



Supporting this we have international contractor team in place: a Philippines-based VA managing newsletter production and social content coordination, a Philippines-based brand designer, a Hong Kong-based retoucher- our team communicates via
 and 
. We pay contractors via Wise.



**You are the layer that keeps all of them on track.** Briefs. Assignments. Deadlines.  



---



## THE ROLE



This is a part-time, async-first role. Hours flex between 10–15/week depending on where we are in the production cycle 



This is not too much of a "do the work" role. This is a **brief, coordinate, QA, and unblock** to get to successful outcomes role. 



The important thing is to know and set up the right systems so you know at any given 
nt: where every deliverable is in the pipeline, who owns the next action, what success looks like at that step, and whether it's on track or what is the blocker as well as whats the easiest way to resolve it - now and in the future. 



---



## WHAT YOU WILL DO



**Know the Clients. Projects and the Team**



You will coordinate a small international contractor team. to serve our firm and our clients.  You need to understand what each person does, what a brief needs to looks like for them, what turnaround to expect, and how to QA their output





**Own / Maintain the Production Process Board**



- Maintain clean Notion tickets, pages for every active newsletter cycle — all 5 phases, all 5 gates, every owner, every deadline

- When we move to two simultaneous newsletter cycles, you ensure they don't collide, every contributor knows what they're working on and when



**Run the Cycle**



- Monday kickoff: confirm topic is locked, outline is drafted, Gates 1 and 1B are cleared

- Brief each contributor for their phase as it opens — don't wait for them to ask

- Chase drafts, design assets, and revisions on schedule

- Gate-check every deliverable: does this match the brief? Is it ready to move forward?

- Own the Wednesday QA: links tested, mobile preview confirmed, test send done, publish scheduled



**Social Content Pipeline**



- Coordinate the 30-day social content calendar — brief ? draft ? revision ? approved ? scheduled ? published

- Manage video clip coordination between the VA and retoucher: file handoff, feedback relay, export approvals

- Upload finalized assets to the content library with correct naming and organization



**Brief Writing**



- Write clear, specific briefs for each contributor at each stage — the right brief means fewer revision rounds and fewer back-and-
 on
/WhatsApp

- Capture feedback from leadership and translate it into actionable direction for the team (e.g. "color grade reference attached — bring warmth up, reduce grey on subject")



**Notion Ownership & Optimization**



- Our Notion is a work in progress — functional but messy. Auditing, reorganizing, and optimizing it is a core part of this role

- Tweak and build templates that actually match how we work, not how Notion thinks we should work

- Troubleshoot broken databases, misconfigured views, and workflows that have drifted from their original intent

- Use Notion AI where it speeds things up; know its limits and when to work around them



**AI-Assisted Workflows**



- You are comfortable prompting Claude and ChatGPT to assist with drafting briefs, SOPs, status summaries, and first-pass copy — not as a crutch, but as a genuine accelerant

- You know how to write a prompt that gets a useful output, and how to edit AI output into something that actually sounds right

- You help the team work smarter by identifying where AI fits into the pipeline and where human judgment is non-negotiable



**Systems & SOPs**



- As we scale, document every new process so it's repeatable without you holding it in your head

- Flag workflow gaps and propose fixes before they become emergencies



---



## THE 3-MONTH RAMP



**Month 1:** Learn the existing 14-day cycle inside out. Own the board. Audit and begin cleaning up Notion. Know every contributor's workflow. Zero missed gates.



**Month 2:** Support the transition to weekly cadence — two cycles running simultaneously. Prove the system holds under pressure.



**Month 3:** Help stand up a second newsletter from a production ops standpoint — new board, new cycle, new contributor briefs. You help build it.



---



## WHO YOU ARE



- You have coordinated a small creative or production team before — you know what it means to brief a designer vs. brief an editor vs. brief a retoucher, and you know the difference

- You communicate with precision via
 and 
 — your messages are short, clear, and always have a next action attached

- You know the difference between a good deliverable and one that just needs to ship — and you know when to flag leadership vs. when to solve it yourself

- Notion is not intimidating to you — you have reorganized a messy workspace before and you know how to build a database that people actually use

- You use Claude and/or ChatGPT regularly and know how to prompt well — not just "write me a brief" but actually getting useful, on-brand output

- You are comfortable with fintech and financial media content — you don't need to be an expert, but you can read a newsletter about markets and know whether the right link is in the right place

- Strong written English — briefs, SOPs, and status updates are core to this role

- Proactive by nature: "Gate 3 is at risk, here's why, here's my proposed fix" is a message you send before anyone asks



**Bonus:**

- Experience coordinating with a distributed international team across time zones and platforms

- Experience with Beehiiv, social video workflows, or short-form content pipelines

- Familiarity with Wise or international contractor payment coordination

- Experience with 
c or similar content/asset libraries



---



## TO APPLY



Send a message with:



1. A specific example of a time you coordinated a small team to a deadline — who did what, how you tracked it, what broke and how you handled it

2. Your experience with Notion specifically — have you ever cleaned up or rebuilt a workspace? Tell us what it looked like before and after

3. How you use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) in your current workflow — be specific

4. Your available hours and EST timezone overlap

title: Motion Graphic Expert
description:
Project-Based / Freelance

Potential for ongoing work if the first project goes well.



OVERVIEW

I’m looking for a highly capable Motion Graphics Designer to help me build the core visual asset system for a YouTube brand.



This is not a role for someone who only drops in flashy templates.



I need someone who understands how to build a clean, premium, editorial motion graphics package that feels custom, modern, and highly usable inside a real editing workflow.



The visual direction is inspired by the style often seen in high-end YouTube documentary / explainer channels — polished, minimal, intentional, information-dense, and built with strong taste and consistency.



The goal is to create a reusable motion graphics system that I can use across future videos in Premiere Pro, with assets built in After Effects and exported as MOGRTs where appropriate.



What I Need Built



I am looking for help creating the core asset library for my editing workflow.



This will likely include:

 • Full-screen title cards

 • Section headers

 • Lower thirds

 • Name / title IDs

 • Source tags / citation tags

 • Callout labels

 • Pointer graphics

 • Highlight boxes

 • Info cards / fact cards

 • Sidebar panels

 • Numbered list builds

 • Comparison layouts

 • Big stat graphics

 • Timeline graphics

 • Screen-recording annotation graphics

 • A consistent transitions / animation style for these assets



The goal is not just to make isolated graphics.

The goal is to build a cohesive system with consistent:

 • typography

 • spacing

 • padding

 • line weights

 • corner radius

 • color usage

 • motion timing

 • easing

 • layout behavior



Software Requirements



You must be comfortable working in:

 • Adobe After Effects

 • Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Essential Graphics / MOGRT workflow



Bonus if you also understand:

 • editorial design

 • broadcast-inspired design systems

 • YouTube retention-focused editing

 • motion systems built for repeat use, not just one-off animation



What “Good” Looks Like



I am not looking for:

 • overdesigned graphics

 • overly flashy animation

 • generic corporate templates

 • loud transitions

 • cheesy YouTube effects

 • motion for motion’s sake



I am looking for:

 • clean editorial motion design

 • premium typography

 • tasteful animation

 • strong visual hierarchy

 • consistency across assets

 • motion that feels smooth and intentional

 • assets that are practical and fast to use in Premiere



Deliverables



The project will likely include:

 • an agreed-upon visual direction for the package

 • a small motion graphics system / style guide

 • After Effects project files

 • organized source files

 • exported MOGRTs for Premiere Pro

 • clearly labeled assets

 • editable controls where useful

 • clean folder organization



Ideal Candidate



You are a strong fit if you:

 • have real taste in modern motion design

 • understand the difference between “template-looking” and “designed”

 • can create a system, not just random assets

 • know how to make graphics flexible for editors

 • are detail-oriented with spacing, timing, typography, and layout

 • can follow references while still making smart design decisions

 • communicate clearly and hit deadlines



To Apply



Please send:

 1. A short intro about your experience

 2. Your portfolio or samples of motion graphics work

 3. Examples of work that feel clean, editorial, premium, or documentary/explainer style

 4. Confirmation that you can work in After Effects + Premiere Pro MOGRT workflow

 5. Your pricing structure for project-based work

 6. Your estimated turnaround time for a project like this

 7. The word “Kallaway” at the top of your application so I know you read this carefully



Important



Please do not apply if your work mainly looks like:

 • gaming edits

 • flashy promo reels

 • heavy glitch effects





I am specifically looking for someone who can help custom build a refined visual language for long-form YouTube content.



Potential for Ongoing Work



If the first project goes well, there is strong potential for additional work creating:

 • new graphics modules

 • one-off custom graphics for future videos

 • refinements to the system

 • ongoing motion support for long-form YouTube content

description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

description:
Job Description: HR Quality Assurance Specialist (Training & Clinical Support)

Children’s Advocate Behavioral Health Clinic

Position Overview

Children’s Advocate is seeking a highly reliable, (degree preferred) detail-oriented Quality Assurance Specialist to support our growing behavioral health team. This role ensures that Therapist Mentors deliver high-quality clinical sessions, follow established policies and procedures, and maintain accurate data collection and documentation.

The QA Specialist plays a key role in training, development, observation, and compliance, and must maintain professional boundaries while providing corrective guidance when needed.

Key Responsibilities

Training & Development Oversight

Support ongoing training of Therapist Mentors.





Ensure mentors follow clinical protocols, program expectations, and data collection requirements.





Provide real-time coaching, redirection, or clarification as needed.





Clinical Quality Assurance

Observe therapy sessions (in-person or via video) to monitor accuracy, performance, and session integrity.





Video-record clinical trials and submit them for review with the Clinical Director.





Provide feedback to mentors to improve intervention quality, professionalism, and compliance.





Ensure all session notes, DAP notes, and data-entry tasks are completed accurately and on time.





Documentation & Compliance

Maintain high-quality records, checklists, and observation logs.





Conduct weekly accuracy audits on documentation and mentor performance.





Support adherence to all clinic policies and professional standards.





Professional Conduct

Maintain neutrality and professionalism — this is not a social role.





Uphold confidentiality, clinical boundaries, and ethical standards at all times.

Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree or higher (Psychology, Social Work, Human Services, Nursing, Education, or related field preferred).





Experience working in counseling, therapy, behavioral health, or clinical settings with children.





Experience with play therapy, child development, or child-centered interventions is a strong plus.





Strong communication, observation, and documentation skills.





Ability to provide corrective feedback professionally and confidently.





Comfortable using video recording tools and digital documentation systems.





Must be dependable, punctual, and committed to consistent attendance.

Compensation

Training Rate: $5.00 per hour (U.S. currency)





Training Duration: 30–60 days





Regular Role Rate: $6.00–$8.00 per hour





Bonuses: Available for 100?curacy in documentation and quality assurance





This role pays for productivity (time actively completing assigned tasks × hours worked).

Position Type

Full-Time or Part-Time

Available Shifts (Monday–Friday):

8:00 AM – 12:00 PM





12:00 PM – 4:00 PM





4:00 PM – 8:00 PM





Saturday Shifts (as needed based on client volume):

8:00 AM – 12:00 PM





12:00 PM – 4:00 PM





Application Requirements

Who you are

How to Be Successful in This Role

 Serious about their work

title: Brand & Packaging Designer
description:
We need a creative packaging designer to help us develop an engaging and visually appealing box for our new card game.



This is an adult, queer party card game designed for groups of gay men to play together. The game blends icebreakers, questions, pop culture, emotional depth, and dares. There will be 250 cards across 7 categories. Each category will have a different color/design but the cards in the same category can all look the same. Each card will have a different question on it. People will pull a card from the middle and answer the question. Each person will also have one card they can use to pass a question. The rules will be minimal and simple.



This is a real product moving toward manufacturing, not a concept project.



Key Deliverables



Logo / Wordmark

- Clean, confident, and bold

- Should work on packaging, cards, and social media



Card Design System

- Poker-size cards (2.5” × 3.5”)

- A reusable layout that works across multiple decks

- Each deck has a different color theme but the same structure

- Clear category title + readable body text

- Designed for full-bleed color printing



Box Packaging

- Design for a small rigid box. I'll attach an example of the box.

- Front, back, and sides

- Strong shelf presence and clear explanation of what the game is

- Fun, sexy, and playful



Instruction Sheet

- One-page, double-sided folded insert

- Easy to understand, visually engaging

- Matches the card and box aesthetic



Production-Ready Files

- Print-ready PDFs. I'll attach the manufacturers template for the box and cards.

- CMYK color mode

- Bleed and crop marks included

- Box dielines

- Files ready to hand directly to a manufacturer



What I’ll Provide

- Finalized card text for all decks

- Game rules and mechanics

title: Shopify E-Commerce Manager / Email Marketer for Skill Toy brand (WITH BONUSES)
description:
I’m Slinky Josh, a content creator with 4 million total followers on social media. I make entertaining, funny, and wholesome videos where I perfor
smerizing tricks with a plastic slinky, and surprise people with my skill in public.



More importantly, I sell my brand of "slinky" (called HyperSpring), which are designed for doing tricks with, and I sell video courses where I teach people how to do the sort of tricks that I do (which I've dubbed "springbending"). I put "slinky" in quotes because Slinky is technically a specific trademarked brand of toy spring (my competitor), though "slinky" is also used as a generic term for the toy in English. 



I am looking for someone highly intelligent and detail-oriented to become my right-hand assistant. My goal is for you to completely take over the day-to-day running of the business, so that I can focus on creating content to grow the business. ?



You will have the opportunity to grow with my business, and if you prove yourself, make much more money than the starting pay that I have posted this listing at. I am in this for the long haul. I am on a mission to spread the joy of springbending around the globe and turn HyperSpring into the #1 brand of toy spring in the world. I have grown this business from a side hustle into a full career over the past 8 years, and I fully intend to continue on this mission until the day I die. ?



*****

BONUSES



To ensure you are as motivated as I am to grow this business, for at least the next 6 months, you will have the following bonus structure in addition to your base hourly pay of $7/hour:



***At the end of each month, you will receive 8% of monthly e-commerce revenue that exceeds $8,000 USD.***



(For context, the business is currently averaging $6000 to $7000 per month in e-commerce revenue.)



(“E-commerce revenue” here means Shopify, plus any other sales channels we end up adding, such as Amazon. It does not include any content creation income which I receive directly from YouTube,
, and TikTok, since that won’t be your focus.)



So for example, if we make $10,000 in revenue for April, you will receive a bonus of (10,000-8,000)*0.08 = $160. 



If we make $15,653, you will receive (15,653-8,000)*0.08 = $612.24. 



And if you can help me get revenue to $30,000 in a month, you will receive (30,000 - 8,000)*0.08 = $1,760. 



There is no cap on this bonus structure. 

If you can get us to $50,000 in a month, your monthly bonus will be $3,360.



This is very possible, since my digital video courses are very undersold in comparison to the HyperSprings, and I have an
 list with 17,000 subscribers which is going almost completely unused currently. There is a LOT of room for us to grow massively. 



For your first month, the bonus will be pro-rated for the number of days you worked in the month. So for example, if I hired you on the 12th of March, it would be (31-12)/31 = 0.613 times whatever the bonus would have been for that month. 



This bonus structure will continue for the next 6 months. After that, I’ll re-evaluate your pay structure to make sure your pay is proportional to your work, while also making sure you stay highly motivated to grow the business. 



*****



Your duties will include:

•
 marketing (including setting up automation flows - I currently have almost none)

• Answering customer service
s (low volume)

• Updating and improving my website, taking SEO into account

•
ing contractors I work with

• Researching random things & reporting back to me

• Checking up on shipments in my 3PL's website & Shopify

• Crunching a few numbers in Google Sheets

• Setting up & maintaining other sales platforms (e.g. Amazon, TikTok Shop, Instagram/Facebook)

• Potentially running ads on
, Google, etc.

• Any other random online tasks I need help with



Here are my non-negotiables. I am looking for someone who:

• Speaks and writes fluent English

• Types decently fast (I will test you on both of these over video)

• Has some kind of marketing experience, ideally
 marketing

• Is intelligent & can think & act independently 



If you have experience with any of the following, that's a plus:

• Shopify

• Course Creator 360

• SEO

• Customer service

• Google Sheets or Excel

• Amazon

• TikTok Shop

• Meta Business Suite (specifically the shopping feature)

• Google Ads

• ClickFunnels

• Building sales funnels in general

• Video editing

• Bookkeeping (Quickbooks)



?****?

HOURS?



I will expect you to work 40 hours a week. ?I will always allow you to pick your own hours, but you must let me know what hours you will work for the upcoming week beforehand, and stick to the schedule you set, or let me know if you need to make any changes. 



I am in Japan until the end of May, which is only 1 hour ahead of Philippines time, so for this time I would like a lot of our hours to overlap so I can train you. ?After that, I will return to the US for at least 2 months, but you can keep working whatever hours you want. 

I will expect you to keep a log of everything you work on each day, and
 it to me at the end of your work day. ??



****?

About AI:

I am 100% fine with you using AI to research, strategize, and bounce ideas off of. In fact I will expect you to use it this way in the course of this job. I will also be fine with you using AI to correct your spelling and grammar in communications with my customers. 



However, you must not use AI to write your application to me, or any messages to me ever. I am trying to hire a person, not ChatGPT, and I need to communicate directly with the person I am hiring. I need to know YOUR strengths and weaknesses, not ChatGPT’s. If I get even a hint that your application or resume was copied and pasted from ChatGPT or any other LLM, I will throw your application in the proverbial trash can. ??



****

In your application, please answer the following questions:



• What is your marketing experience? Please describe it in detail. Please do not bother applying to this job if you do not have any marketing experience. 

• What other relevant experience do you have? Please describe in detail.

• What tools do you use to stay organized?

• What would your
 marketing strategy look like for me? (Given I already have a list with 17,000
 addresses that is almost completely unused)

• If I hired you on March 17, and we made $7,482 that month in e-commerce revenue, what would your bonus be for that month? 

• Why do you want to work for me?

• At what age did you start learning English? And how did you learn?

• Do you own your own computer?

• Where do you live? 

• How fast is your internet? Please include a screenshot from an internet speed test.

• Where would you be working from? (Home, internet cafe, etc?)

• How frequently do you have power or internet outages there?

• Do you have a backup location you can work from in case of outages?

• Do you have any other job or school currently? And if so, how many hours a week? 

• How soon would you be able to start?

title: Remote Full-Stack Developer – Construction Tech AI Integrations Building AI-Powered Workflow Automation
description:
About the Company

Connacht Group is a Chicago-based general contractor specializing in hospitality construction projects. We manage complex commercial construction workflows involving detailed project management, subcontractor coordination, procurement, and contract management across multiple properties.

We’re modernizing our operational workflows by integrating AI and automation to reduce administrative burden on our project teams and improve project delivery outcomes.



The Role

We’re seeking an experienced full-stack developer to design and build multiple custom integrations that connect Claude AI, Procore (our project management platform), and other business tools we rely on. This is a long-term engagement to build several interconnected systems that will streamline critical workflows across our project teams.

Primary Integration: Claude + Procore Submittal Automation. This is a fully remote position.



What You’ll Build:

A web-based application that uses Claude AI to automate two critical construction workflows:

 1. Submittal Generation System

 ? Ingests project specification PDFs (
pages)

 ? Integrates Microsoft Project schedules

 ? Uses Claude to parse specs and identify all submittal requirements

 ? Generates comprehensive submittal logs in Excel format

 ? Creates Procore submittals via API

 ? Supports interactive refinement (users ask questions, Claude refines analysis)

 2. Submittal Review System

 ? Accepts incoming submittal packages (shop drawings, certifications, test reports, cut sheets)

 ? Retrieves project specifications and drawings from Procore

 ? Uses Claude + OCR to extract technical data from submittals

 ? Cross-checks compliance against specs and drawings

 ? Generates detailed PDF compliance reports with citations to spec sections

 ? Uploads review results back to Procore

 ? Supports iterative clarification loop with users

Key Technical Requirements:

 ? Procore API integration (OAuth authentication, submittal creation/updates, file uploads)

 ? Claude API integration (vision, document analysis, multi-turn conversations)

 ? PDF processing and OCR (handling scanned documents, technical drawings)

 ? Microsoft Project file parsing (.mpp, .xml schedule files)

 ? Web application frontend (React or similar) for upload, review, and approval

 ? Backend service (Python/FastAPI or Node/Express)

 ? Cloud hosting and database design

 ? Comprehensive error handling and validation

Secondary Integrations

You’ll also be building 2-3 additional integrations (to be discussed in detail upon engagement) that likely involve:

 ? Asana ? Procore task synchronization

 ?
/Microsoft Teams notifications and workflows

 ? Custom reporting and data pipeline automation



Technical Skills Required

Core Requirements (Must Have)

 ? 5+ years full-stack development (Python + React/Node, or equivalent modern stack)

 ? API integration experience – comfortable working with REST APIs, authentication (OAuth, API tokens), rate limiting

 ? PDF/document processing – experience with libraries like PDFPlumber, PyPDF, or similar

 ? Database design – SQL, schema design, proper data modeling

 ? Cloud platform experience – AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure (deployment, storage, security)

 ? Authentication & Security – securing API keys, environment management, HTTPS/TLS, data handling

Highly Valuable

 ? Large Language Model (LLM) integration – experience with Claude API, GPT APIs, or similar (prompt engineering, token management, cost optimization)

 ? OCR & Computer Vision – Tesseract, OpenCV, or similar libraries

 ? Construction industry knowledge – familiarity with construction workflows, Procore, or project management tools

 ? Procore API experience – prior integrations with Procore platform

 ? Document understanding – experience parsing technical documents, specifications, or complex PDFs

Nice to Have

 ? Experience with Model Context Protocols (MCPs) for AI integration

 ? GraphQL experience

 ? CI/CD and testing infrastructure (pytest, Jest, GitHub Actions)

 ? Serverless architecture (Lambda, Cloud Functions)

 ? Real-time features (WebSockets, Server-Sent Events)

title: Cold Calling Sales Closer
description:
We are growing our dog accessories division by bringing handcrafted Maasai leather beaded collars to pet lovers and retailers around the world. These collars are made by skilled Maasai artisans in Kenya, combining cultural heritage, premium leather and durable, water-resistant construction. The result is a unique, story-driven product that helps stores stand out and delight their customers.



As a Cold Calling Sales Closer, you own the entire sales cycle on the phone: from first contact with qualified leads to closing initial orders and repeat purchases. You will speak directly with pet retailers, groomers, boarding facilities and importers, present our product, handle objections and secure sales. Your income grows with your results through a monthly salary plus a commission-based structure.



What you will do

- Filter & Call qualified leads from our database and introduce our products.

- Identify quickly if the prospect is a retailer, groomer, boarding facility, vet clinic or importer, and adapt your pitch.

- Present the product clearly: benefits, premium look and in-store positioning.

- Ask targeted questions to understand their business.

- Handle objections  and turn them into opportunities.

- Close sales directly on the call.

- Follow up with warm prospects and turn interest into paid orders.

- Keep accurate notes in the CRM so nothing falls through the cracks.

- Share patterns and feedback with the team to improve scripts, offers and targeting.



We’re not looking for someone who

- Only books meetings and avoids asking for the order.

- Is uncomfortable discussing price or negotiating on the phone.

- Needs a large fixed salary and dislikes performance-based pay.

- Reads scripts word-for-word without listening or adapting.

- Avoids high outbound activity or takes rejection personally.



What’s in it for you

High earning potential through a commission-based model with uncapped upside.

A differentiated, easy-to-love product with a real story behind it.

Direct, visible impact on company growth with clear revenue attribution.

Remote-friendly setup and flexibility to organize your calling blocks.

Growth opportunities into Senior Closer, Key Account or Sales Team Lead.

Preferred experience



Must have

Accent: Clear, easily understood English with a neutral or American accent.

1–3+ years of experience in phone-based sales (telesales, outbound closing, SDR/BDR with closing responsibilities, etc.).

Proven track record of selling directly on calls, not just setting appointments.

Strong bias for action and comfort with daily activity and revenue targets.

Excellent spoken English and a clear, confident phone presence.

Strong listening and objection-handling skills; you are comfortable asking for the sale.

Comfortable with a fixed salary plus commission-based or commission-heavy pay structures.

Solid discipline in using CRM tools and following up.

Good, stable internet connection suitable for VoIP calls and remote work.

Resilience, persistence and a genuine growth mindset.



Nice to have

Experience selling to small businesses in the pet industry (retailers, groomers, vet clinics, distributors).

Experience in international sales or working across time zones.

High tech literacy with sales tools and AI assistants.

Background in sales, customer service or operations where you owned a target.



Recruitment process

Application with short Job requirements testing

Sales interview focused on your past closing experience and results.

Live cold-call simulation with feedback.

Final interview to align on commission structure, targets and ramp-up.

Reference check.

Offer.



We value real skills and real outcomes. If you are not willing to do a short live role-play or share a sample call (even anonymized), this is probably not the right role for you.

description:

title: AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)
description:
AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)



 Job Description



We are looking for an AI Developer / Machine Learning Engineer  to help build a custom AI skin analysis system  for a technology platform in the skin health and aesthetics industry.



This system will power our upcoming platform Skin United, which connects consumers with trained skin professionals and provides intelligent skin analysis and recommendations.



The goal is to build our own AI infrastructure  rather than relying on third-party AI tools or subscription platforms.



You will work alongside our existing development team  who are building the website and app infrastructure.



The AI system will analyse facial images and skin data to identify skin concerns and support personalised skin insights.



Examples of similar platforms include:



* Haut.AI

* Renude



---



 Responsibilities



You will help design and build the AI engine for skin analysis  including:



• Image-based skin analysis using computer vision

• Detecting skin conditions such as acne, pigmentation, redness, pores, texture, and ageing indicators

• Training and improving machine learning models for skin analysis

• Working with datasets of facial images to train models

• Integrating the AI model into our existing web/app infrastructure via API

• Collaborating with our development team building the platform

• Optimising model performance and accuracy

• Helping design the AI workflow used by the platform







 Required Skills



We are looking for someone experienced in:



• Python

• Machine Learning / AI development

• Computer Vision

• Image processing

• TensorFlow or PyTorch

• OpenCV

• API development

• Working with large datasets for model training



Experience building AI analysis tools or computer vision models  is highly preferred.







# Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience with:



• Dermatology or skincare datasets

• AI recommendation engines

• Image segmentation models

• Mobile / web AI integration

• Cloud AI deployment



---



# How You Will Work With Us



You will collaborate with:



• Our internal development team building the platform

• Product leadership defining the AI features

• Marketing and product teams defining the user experience



The AI model will need to integrate with the platform backend via API .



---



# Working Hours



Flexible, but ideally overlapping a few hours with Indian and UK timefor collaboration with the dev team.



---



# Pay



Open depending on experience.



Please include:



• Your expected hourly rate 

• Examples of AI or machine learning projects you have built

• Your experience with computer vision or image analysis



---



# Important



We are specifically looking for someone who can build a custom AI model, not someone who only integrates existing AI APIs.



---



# How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short introduction about your AI / ML experience

2. Examples of relevant projects or GitHub repositories

3. Your hourly rate

4. Confirmation that you are comfortable working with an existing development team.

5. Explain how you would build an AI system that analyses facial images to detect skin conditions.

title: Night Shift Execution Assistant
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



OPENING STATEMENT



An Australian business is hiring a night-shift Execution Assistant to support our live racing operation. The job is straightforward: follow clear instructions, focus on the task at hand and ensure things run smoothly overnight. No betting experience is required - all training is provided.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Stable, long-term work for 3-4 nights per week to start, with the potential to take on more hours as you prove your reliability.

* Remote position - work from the comfort of your home during late-night hours.

* Paid training and support so you can learn our processes quickly.

* Clear expectations and a calm working environment.



==============================



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



* 20,000 PHP starting salary during probation.

* 23,500 PHP monthly salary + 1,500 PHP monthly benefits after successful probation.

* 13th month pay.

* 20 days paid annual leave + 10 paid sick days.

* Stable, long-term role with an Australian company.



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Watch live racing events and carry out execution tasks exactly as instructed.

* Keep track of event times and prepare for the next event while monitoring the current one.

* Keep an eye on balances and status indicators - pause or stop activity when asked.

* Record what you did and any results so we can review later.



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Sharp attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions precisely.

* Calm under pressure, with the ability to handle several tasks at once without getting confused.

* Comfortable working night shifts (around 10:00 pm - 4:30 am AEST) and staying focused for several hours.

* Willing to ask questions when something is not clear rather than guessing.

* Reliable internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace.



==============================



NICE TO HAVE (OPTIONAL)



* Experience in any fast-paced environment that required careful execution (e.g., trading, logistics, live events).

* Ability to write clear notes and help improve how we do things.



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Work 3-4 nights per week during Australian late-night hours (about 10:00 pm - 4:30 am AEST, sometimes later).

* A short break (about 45-60 minutes) is usually available around midnight.

* Once you demonstrate reliability, more nights may be offered.



If you enjoy execution work, are detail-oriented and are comfortable working nights, we encourage you to apply. More details about the specifics of the role will be provided during the application process.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post.

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome).

* Optionally, you may write a message.

* Click Send
.

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process.

title: Handwriting Notes (No Experience Required)
description:
Job Title: Handwriting Specialist (Authentic Handwriting Required)



Role Overview:

I am looking for a detail-oriented person to help me with a specific, high-touch direct mail project. The goal is for my mailers to look like a neighbor or a friend personally sent them.



Your Responsibilities:



Authentic Handwriting: You will be handwriting addresses on envelopes and short, personal notes on Post-it notes. I need the handwriting to be legible but look "human" (with natural variations), not like a cold, robotic machine.



Accuracy: You will be copying addresses from a provided list. Zero errors allowed.



Quality Control: You will be responsible for ensuring the placement of notes is consistent but natural.



Packaging: You will be responsible for carefully organizing and packaging these items for shipment to my office in the US.



What I Am Looking For:



Excellent Penmanship: Your handwriting must be clear, neat, and professional.



High Attention to Detail: You double-check your work so I don't have to.



Independence: You don’t need to be micro-managed. You understand that "done right" is more important than "done fast."



Reliability: You are looking for a long-term, consistent project.



Project Details:



Workflow: You will write the pieces, pack them securely, and ship them to me in Miami.



Materials: All materials will be provided or expensed.



Performance: I am looking for quality over speed. I would rather you write 20 perfect, authentic-looking envelopes per hour than 50 messy ones.



To Apply:

Please do not just send a generic cover letter. Attach a photo of a sample of your handwriting. Write the following sentence on a piece of paper and send it as a photo:

"I am interested in this handwriting project and I pay attention to the details."

title: Go High Level Expert (5 years minimum)
description:
Job Title



GoHighLevel Implementation & Automation Specialist (Virtual Assistant)



Role Summary



We’re a growing trades/service business looking for an experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) specialist to fully implement, optimise, and manage GHL across our entire operation.



This is not a basic VA role. You will be responsible for building, optimising, and maintaining GoHighLevel to its maximum capability, turning it into the backbone of our marketing, sales, and client communication systems.

What You'll Do:

Tracking & Reporting:

Content Collection & Organization:

, or organic channels.



You’re a Great Fit If You:

- Are organized enough to track dozens of moving parts, but flexible enough to adjust as things evolve.



Nice to Have (Not Required):



- Familiarity with Euka or similar automation tools.



- Background in working with early-stage DTC brands or start-up environments.



- Understanding of affiliate workflows inside TikTok Shop.



Schedule & Expectations

Compensation



- Competitive wage based on experience.

Responsibilities include building detailed investment models and pro formas, preparing offering memorandums, conducting market and regulatory research, producing monthly asset-level financial reporting, closing the books each month, and preparing annual budgets and financial forecasts for individual properties and portfolio-level rollups. Candidates must have strong Excel modeling skills, experience analyzing real estate investments and development opportunities, and a deep understanding of local market dynamics. This role is intended for a serious, experienced real estate analyst capable of supporting real-world investment and development decisions.

title: UChat Automations Developer - WhatsApp Flow
description:
We’re building a WhatsApp-based course delivery and need an experienced UChat developer to lead the automation side of this project. You will be developing this with n8n+Supabase developer from our team for faster implementation.



# What we’re building:

1) Users sign up on a website, receives a unique ID and is forwarded to WhatsApp (should send us this ID)

2) ID triggers UChat to pull their data from Supabase and enroll them into a course sequence

3) Based on the data we pulled out (language, format audio/video, course_name) we will provide certain content to a user



# Your job for this prototype:

Build a 10-day WhatsApp course sequence in UChat. Each day’s lesson is delivered in this exact structure:

1. Message 1 Variable (text)

2. Message 2 Variable (text)

3. Media Dynamic Block: native audio file or link with preview. Pulled dynamically from Supabase or any cloud database that could match

4. Question Variable: “How many people did you share today’s lesson with?” (and their answer will be sent to Supabase)



(!) All content (messages, audio URLs, media links) is pulled dynamically from Supabase, nothing is hardcoded in UChat.



Timing is critical:

? Day 1 sends immediately on enrollment

? Day 2 sends 23h 45min after Day 1 (to keep the 24-hour WhatsApp conversation window open and avoid template message costs)

? Same logic applies for Days 3–10. We try to make them engage during previous days to stay inside 24h window as much as possible. If 24h is off, we send them a WhatsApp template so they could engage with is and we could continue the course

? Share count answers from users must be saved back to Supabase



# Tech environment:

? UChat (you lead this — this is your core responsibility)

? Supabase (database — another dev helps you with it)

? n8n (automation middleware — the same developer helps you with it)



# You must have:

? Strong hands-on UChat experience (probably connected via 360dialog)

? Experience with HTTP request nodes and dynamic content from external databases

? Understanding of WhatsApp’s 24-hour conversation window and how to work within it



This is a paid prototype with strong potential to continue into full product development for the right person. This prototype should be finished within a week preferably ?



?? Please share examples of UChat flows you’ve built, especially any involving dynamic content or external database integration.

title: Lead Qualifier/QA & Follow-Up VA — (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Lead Qualifier/QA & Follow-Up VA For U.S. Real Estate Marketing Company (Full-Time, Remote)



**Location:** Remote

**Hours:** Full-time | 8 hours/day | Monday–Friday (Opportunity to work more hours if needed)

**Pay:** $3–$5/hour USD (based on experience) + bonus per qualified lead

**Start Date:** ASAP



---



About the Company



US-based real estate investment marketing company. Outbound cold calling marketing company, lead nurturing, and appointment setting for real estate clients across the United States. Your job is to review what happened on those calls and make sure the right leads get submitted to our clients and follow up with leads that may not be ready yet.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



This is a detail-oriented, process-driven role. Every day you will:



- **Read call transcripts** from real estate lead campaigns and determine whether each lead is qualified, unqualified, or needs follow-up

- **Fill out a qualification form** in our internal dashboard for every call you review — accuracy is critical

- **Update lead statuses** in Google Sheets and our CRM after each review

- **Make outbound follow-up calls** to leads who showed interest but need a human touchpoint to move forward

- **Communicate updates and flag issues** to the team via Slack



You will NOT be doing cold calling. These are warm leads who have already spoken with our team — you are the human follow-through.



---



## You're a Great Fit If You:



- Have **experience in real estate, lead generation, or sales support** (Required)

- Have done **outbound calling or phone follow-up work** before

- Are **extremely organized** — you will be reviewing high volumes of transcripts daily

- Have a **strong/fluent command of written and spoken English**

- Are **honest and detail-oriented** — we verify all work. Inaccurate form submissions or missed follow-ups will be rejected.

- Can work **independently without hand-holding** — you'll have clear processes, but you need to own your queue

- Have a **quiet workspace and fast, reliable internet** for outbound calls



---



## Tools You'll Use (provided)



- **Google Sheets** — lead tracking and status updates

- **Internal Dashboard** — transcript review and form submission

- **Slack** — team communication and task updates

- **Calling platform** — for manual outbound follow-up calls



---



## Compensation



| Base Pay | $3.00–$5.00/hr USD (based on experience and interview) |

| Lead Bonus | Paid per qualified lead confirmed through your follow-up

| Payment |bi-weekly via direct transfer



---



## How to Apply



To be considered, you **must** include the following in your application:



1. Your resume and verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining any relevant experience — **this is required, text-only applications will not be reviewed**

3. Answer this question in writing: *"A lead says they are interested in selling their home but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead and what do you do next?"*



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



**We are a small, fast-moving team. We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else. If that describes you, we'd love to hear from you.**

title: GHL Specialist
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring

Are you the systems-driven GHL Specialist we’re looking for?



Are you highly organised, technically confident on Go High Level, and obsessed with building systems that just work? Do you love automation, clean CRM setups, and optimising funnels and workflows so businesses can scale without chaos?

If you’re someone who enjoys turning complexity into clarity and wants to play a key role in how a growing digital agency operates, this could be the perfect role for you.



Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and performance marketing. Behind every great campaign is a strong system — and that’s where you come in.

We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a dedicated GHL (GoHighLevel) Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of systems, and build scalable automation that supports real business outcomes.



You are:

Highly experienced with GoHighLevel (GHL). (Do not apply if you are a beginner on GHL)



Confident building workflows, automations, funnels, campaigns, and dashboards.



Experienced in creating agents inside the GHL ecosystem and using AI features.



Exceptionally organised and detail-oriented.



Comfortable troubleshooting system, automation, and data issues.



Process-driven and able to think logically about customer journeys.



Proactive in identifying inefficiencies and improving systems.



Calm under pressure and solutions-focused.



A clear communicator who can explain systems in simple terms.



Accountable, reliable, and committed to high-quality execution.



A fast learner who stays up to date with platform updates and best practices.



If you love automation, clean setups, and making systems more efficient, you’ll thrive in this role.





ABOUT THE ROLE

The GHL Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team to support marketing, sales, and client delivery.



You will:

Build, manage, and optimise CRM setups inside GoHighLevel.



Create and maintain workflows, triggers, and automations.



Build and manage SMS and
 campaigns.



Create and optimise funnels and landing pages within GHL.



Manage integrations between GHL and third-party tools.



Monitor system performance and troubleshoot issues.



Maintain accurate pipelines, contact data, and reporting dashboards.



Create GHL AI agents and AI voice agents



Support onboarding of new clients into GHL systems.



Document processes and ensure systems are scalable and repeatable.



Creating snapshots of the validated processes.





This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone working within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be an integral part of a growing agency. It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET WHEN YOU JOIN MILKYWAY

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your systems expertise makes a real impact.

You’ll enjoy:

A collaborative and professional team culture.





Clear expectations and ownership over systems and automation.





Training and onboarding to align with our processes and standards.





Opportunities to deepen your expertise in automation and CRM strategy.





Exposure to a wide range of client accounts and use cases.





Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work.





We believe strong systems are the foundation of sustainable growth — for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit for you, we’d love to hear from you.

Click the link to apply and include the phrase “Startdust” in the final section of the application form so we know you read this in full.

If you know someone who would be a great fit, please pass this opportunity on.

We look forward to meeting the GHL Specialist who will help power the systems behind our growth.

description:
