Hera Digital | Remote (Philippines) | One-Time Project | $250 USD Fixed





About Us



Hera Digital is an Australian B2B sales automation agency that helps software and service companies build predictable revenue systems using AI. We're a lean, fast-moving team and we take our brand seriously — clean, sharp, and results-driven in everything we put out.



---



What We Need



We're looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines for a **one-month project in March 2025**. You'll edit and publish **8 short-form social media reels** for our brand across our social platforms.



This is a fixed-price, project-based role to start. **We are actively looking to build a long-term relationship with the right editor.** If the quality of your work is excellent and you're a reliable communicator, we want to bring you on as our go-to video editor on an ongoing monthly retainer beyond March. Think of this project as a paid trial — we want it to be the start of something, not a one-off.



---



Your Responsibilities



- Edit 8 engaging short-form reels (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok-style) from raw footage and/or assets we provide

- Follow our brand identity guide closely — we will share this with you on day one (colours, fonts, tone, style)

- Add captions, lower thirds, motion graphics, and on-brand text overlays to every reel

- Apply colour grading consistent with our brand aesthetic (clean, dark, professional)

- Source and clear licensed background music appropriate to each video (Artlist or Epidemic Sound preferred)

- Schedule and publish all 8 reels to our social platforms via our **Buffer account** (we will provide access)

- Communicate progress, share drafts for feedback, and action revisions promptly via **Slack**

- Deliver all final files organised and named clearly in a shared folder (Google Drive)



---



What We're Looking For

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 3+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Remote Business Development – Fintech / Payment (Flexible Hours)
description:
Remote Payment BD Associate – Commission + Growth Role



Flexible Remote Opportunity (Full-time or Part-time)



We are expanding our 2026 merchant acquisition team and looking for motivated individuals who can help introduce potential merchants to our payment platform.



About Us



We are a cross-border payment solutions provider serving digital merchants across:



• Indonesia

• India



Our clients include:



• Online gaming platforms

• Forex & trading companies

• High-frequency digital businesses



Our mission is to help merchants integrate local payment methods and scale their global operations.



Role Overview



As a Remote Payment BD Associate, your role is to help identify and introduce merchants that may benefit from our payment infrastructure.



Key responsibilities include:



• Research potential merchants and platforms

• Connect with decision makers

• Present our payment solution at a high level

• Introduce interested merchants to our team

• Assist during early-stage communication and API onboarding

• Support merchants through the test transaction stage



You will work closely with our internal team once a merchant shows interest.



What You Are NOT Responsible For



BD associates are not required to:



• Sign contracts

• Approve special pricing

• Make final commercial decisions



All contracts and final pricing approvals are handled by the company.



What Counts as a Successful Merchant



A merchant is considered successfully onboarded when:



• A decision maker is identified

• The merchant agrees to explore cooperation

• API onboarding is completed

• At least one successful test transaction is processed



This API test stage is the main milestone for BD performance.



Trial Period (2 Weeks)



All new BD associates begin with a 2-week trial period.



To successfully complete the trial, you must:



• Onboard at least one merchant to API test stage



Trial Completion Reward:



USD $200



(This is paid when the minimum requirement is met.)



After Passing Trial



Monthly Base Compensation:



USD $400



Important:



The base compensation is performance-conditional.



To qualify for the base each month:



• At least 1 merchant must reach test stage



Commission Structure



BD associates will also receive:



0.02% commission on transaction volume



Fro
rchants they introduce.



Commission terms:



• Valid for 6 months per merchant

• Calculated monthly

• No commission cap



High-volume merchants can generate significant recurring income.



Example Earnings



If a merchant processes:



Daily volume: USD 150,000

Monthly volume: USD 4.5M



0.02% commission = USD 900 per month



Multiple merchants = scalable earnings.



Work Structure



This role offers:



• Remote work

• Flexible schedule

• Full-time or part-time options



Performance matters more than working hours.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience in business development or lead generation

• Is comfortable initiating business conversations

• Has strong research skills

• Is proactive and disciplined

• Is familiar with
, WhatsApp, and online outreach



Experience in fintech, gaming, or trading industries is a plus.



Application Process



To apply, please answer the following questions:



1?? Have you worked in business development or lead generation before?



2?? How would you approach a gaming or forex merchant?



3?? Are you comfortable working with performance-based compensation?



4?? Can you complete a short research task within 48 hours?



Applications without answers may not be reviewed.

title: AI Avatar Video Specialist (Hyper-Realistic Advertising Content)
description:
**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Freelance / Contract (Potential for Ongoing Work)



**Overview**



We are looking for a highly skilled AI Avatar Video Specialist who can create **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos** for paid advertising. These will be used primarily for **short-form ads, reels, talking-head videos, and social media campaigns**.



This role is **not for beginners or general AI video users**. We are specifically looking for someone who can produce **near-indistinguishable AI human avatars** with **perfect lip sync, natural facial movement, realistic body motion, and cinematic-quality output** suitable for high-performing paid ads.



If your work looks obviously AI-generated or basic, this role is **not the right fit**.



---



**What You’ll Be Responsible For**



* Creating **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos** designed for paid advertising

* Producing **talking-head style ad creatives** for platforms like Instagram, TikTok,
 and YouTube

* Ensuring **flawless lip sync accuracy** between audio and avatar speech

* Generating **natural facial expressions, eye movement, and body motion**

* Producing content **quickly and consistently** for ongoing ad testing

* Editing and refining outputs to ensure **high realism and professional quality**

* Adapting avatars to different scripts, tones, and campaign styles

* Delivering **short-form video content (10–60 seconds)** optimized for social platforms

* Maintaining **high production standards across large volumes of content**



---



**Required Skills & Experience**



* Proven experience creating **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos**

* Strong understanding of **AI video generation tools and workflows**

* Ability to produce avatars that are **extremely difficult to distinguish from real humans**

* Advanced skill with **lip syncing, facial animation, and natural motion**

* Experience producing **content for paid social advertising**

* Fast turnaround times and ability to deliver **multiple creatives per week**

* Strong attention to detail and ability to refine outputs for realism

* Comfortable working with **scripts and direct response style advertising**



---



**Examples of Tools (or Similar)**



You should already be experienced with advanced AI video tools such as:



* HeyGen

* Synthesia

* D-ID

* Runway

* ElevenLabs (voice)

* Other advanced avatar or generative video tools



Experience combining **multiple tools to improve realism** is a strong advantage.



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Someone who specialises in **AI avatar realism**

* Someone who understands **paid ad creative performance**

* Someone who can produce **high-quality content at scale**

* Someone proactive who can **experiment and iterate quickly**



---



**Application Requirements**



To apply, please include:



1. **Portfolio of AI avatar videos you have created**

2. Examples of **hyper-realistic talking-head style content**

3. Details of **tools and workflow you use**

4. Your **typical turnaround time per video**



Applications **without strong examples of hyper-realistic AI avatars will not be considered.**



Send application to:

title: Plumbing  Sales Coordinator and dispatch
description:
Position Overview



We are looking for a highly motivated Sales Coordinator with strong experience in selling plumbing or HVAC services.

Your primary responsibility will be to generate new business, conduct daily outreach, close deals, and maintain relationships with contractors and clients.



In addition to sales duties, you will handle incoming calls, assist with dispatching technicians, manage work orders, and maintain our CRM system.



This role requires excellent English, a confident personality, and the ability to communicate clearly with both customers and partners in the plumbing/HVAC industry.



Primary Responsibilities (Sales-Driven Role)

1. Sales Outreach & Lead Generation (PRIMARY FUNCTION)



Conduct daily outbound
 outreach to:

• general contractors

• remodelers

• designers

• construction firms

• property managers

• commercial clients



Write professional, persuasive
s to introduce Citi Plumbing services.



Follow up consistently and maintain a structured sales pipeline.



Understand plumbing & HVAC service categories and sell solutions confidently.



Build long-term relationships and expand business opportunities.



2. Cold Calling (Sales Expansion & Deal Closing)



Make outbound sales calls to:

• GCs

• builders

• property management companies

• commercial clients



Present services clearly and professionally.



Handle objections and work to convert leads into paying customers.



Log all calls, notes, and follow-ups in CRM.



Operational & Support Responsibilities

3. Answer Incoming Calls (Lead Conversion)



Receive calls from warranty companies, property managers, homeowners, and clients.



Ask basic plumbing questions (leaks, clogs, water heaters, fixtures).



Convert calls into scheduled service appointments.



Enter call details into CRM accurately.



4. Work Order Management



Receive work orders from
 and platforms such as HomeServe, 2TEN, and others.



Enter job details into Zoho CRM.



Assign tasks to technicians and track progress from start to finish.



Ensure all photos, notes, updates, and completion details are properly documented.



5. CRM & Administrative Tasks



Maintain CRM records daily (leads, follow-ups, calls, work orders, statuses).



Track open jobs, estimates, and completed tasks.



Send daily or weekly status updates when required.



Communicate professionally with customers, technicians, and management.



Requirements



Proven sales experience in plumbing, HVAC, construction, remodeling, or related industries.



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).



Ability to close deals, handle objections, and speak confidently.



Experience with CRM systems (Zoho preferred; others acceptable).



Ability to multitask between sales, calls, dispatching, and admin tasks.



Quiet, professional home workspace.



High-speed, stable internet connection (with backup preferred).



Additional Instructions for Candidates



Please submit the following:



Short video introduction (30–60 seconds) describing your sales experience.



Photo of your workspace.



Screenshot of your internet speed test (speedtest.net).



Internet details: provider, download/upload speed, type (fiber/wifi), backup option.



Why Join Us?



Stable, long-term opportunity in a growing plumbing company.



Work with a professional team based in the USA.



Competitive salary based on skill and experience.



Opportunity to grow into a full Sales Manager role.

title: Inbound High Ticket Sales Sepcialist (Inbound Leads Provided)(Uncapped Commission)
description:
About the Opportunity

We are a fast-growing company with more inbound leads than we can handle, and we need elite people who can step in, have real conversations, and help transform lives.



This is not a cold-calling job. 



These are inbound leads most who are already raising their hand. 



Your job is to connect, qualify, and convert them into booked appointments for our senior closers.



If you're motivated by income, driven by results, and you have a reason to succeed that goes beyond a paycheck? keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing



Engaging inbound leads via chat/phone and turning interest into booked appointments

Asking the right questions to qualify prospects and understand their situation

Following a proven process while bringing your own energy and personality to every conversation

Hitting daily and weekly KPIs with ownership and accountability

Representing a company that actually changes people's lives





This Role Is For You If...

? You are 100% income-motivated and want to earn what you make

? You have a strong personal "why" — a goal, a family, a dream that pushes you

? You take radical ownership of your results — no excuses, no blame

? You're punctual, consistent, and treat this like a business, not a job

? You love talking to people and have a natural ability to build trust fast

? You want to grow — into closing, leadership, or higher commission tiers



This Role Is NOT For You If...

? You want predictable, low-effort work

? You disappear when things get hard

? You need to be micromanaged

? You're looking for "easy money"

We will work hard together. The income is real. But so is the standard.



Compensation & Details



High Commission No Base (Cash bonuses and high earning incentives)

Smaller Base + Smaller Commission (uncapped earning potential)



Full-time, remote

Engaged leads, inbound leads, no cold
ing or dming



Training and scripts provided, but top performers bring their own edge

Fast-growth company with clear paths to advancement





To Apply

Don't just send a resume. Tell us:



Why do you need to succeed right now? What's your "why"?

What's the highest-earning month you've had in a sales role, and how did you get there? (if none, why do you want to get into a sales role?)

What is your monthly income goal and why?



Applications without answers to these questions will not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Assistant (Social Media Strategist), Australia focus
description:
We're looking for a senior Social Media Strategist to help us build and run repeatable content systems for our clients. This is not a posting scheduler role. We need someone who can take a brief, think strategically, and turn it into a clear plan that’s easy to execute.



You’ll own the strategy side, guide the content direction, and manage the workflow with our internal editors so content actually ships on time, on brand, and with purpose.



What you’ll be doing

 • Take a brand brief and build a strong social strategy, including:

 • Avatars and audience breakdowns

 • Content pillars and topics

 • Video ideas and series concepts

 • Frameworks, hooks, angles, and messaging direction

 • Clear filming guidance so content is easy to capture

 • Competitor research and positioning analysis, Australian market awareness matters here

 • Idea generation and topic research, strong judgement over chasing trends, focus on what’s worth filming

 • Create polished strategy decks and content plans in Canva, presented like a proper client-ready deck

 • Manage content delivery end-to-end:

 • Maintain content calendars

 • Brief editors and coordinate edits, you won’t be editing yourself

 • Manage feedback loops, approvals, and version control

 • Reporting and optimisation:

 • Track performance, pull insights, recommend improvements

 • Identify what to double down on and what to kill



You’re a fit if you have

 • 5–10+ years experience in social media strategy, content marketing, and scripting

 • Proven ability to write social strategies that actually translate into content people can film

 • Strong creative instincts and structured thinking, you can generate ideas fast without losing quality

 • Great taste, you understand brand, tone, and consistency, and you can keep content aligned

 • Confidence working autonomously and making calls without being micromanaged

 • Strong working knowledge of the Australian market, audiences, and competitive landscape

 • Comfortable collaborating with editors, managing deadlines, and keeping projects moving



Deliverables you’ll own

 • Strategy decks in Canva, structured, clear, client-ready

 • Monthly content plans and filming guidance

 • Editor briefs, feedback notes, and approval workflows

 • Performance reporting with practical recommendations



Working style and expectations

 • Remote role, async-friendly, but responsive

 • Fast turnaround is important, we move quickly and keep momentum

 • You’ll be working closely with Steven, Director at Ivory Media, and coordinating with our editing team



To apply



Send through:

 • A short intro

 • 2–3 examples of social media strategy decks you’ve built (Canva or PDF links)

 • One example of competitor research you’ve done, even if anonymised

 • Your hourly rate or monthly retainer range, and your weekly availability

 • Any brands you’ve worked with that are relevant to the Australian market
